STH_expedition.513.desc: When the ship has achieved optimal firing angle the captain gives the order to concentrate the fire of all available weapons on the detected energy conduit junction and to give it everything the ship has got, knowing that this will most likely be the last chance they have left.\n\nWith multiple weapons hitting the junction at once a violent explosion strikes the alien ship with power levels seemingly fluctuating on board of it. The alien vessel turns slowly around, with seemingly it's weapons disabled, and engages its warp drive leaving the system.
STH_expedition.513.name: Big explosion on the hostile alien vessel
STH_expedition.514.a: Take the scan and set course for the next destination.
STH_expedition.52.desc: While not every distress call can be answered, each failure to respond to incidents reflects poorly on the [Root.GetName]'s reputation is this part of space.
STH_expedition.52.name: Three Year Mission 2: Freighter destroyed
STH_expedition.53.desc: We have been contacted by a local trader, who has a number of minerals they would be willing to trade with us.
STH_expedition.53.name: Three Year Mission 2: Trader Found
STH_expedition.600.desc: Our flagship has returned home to [Root.GetHomeWorldName] and the experiences gained by [sth_expedition_Leader_flag.GetName] and their crew will be invaluable. Once the crew has rested and recovered they are free to start their next adventure.
STH_expedition.600.name: Flagship 3-Year Mission Year 3: Home
STH_expedition.63.desc: [sth_expedition_leader_3.GetName] has identified a planet with unusual properties on long range scans that deserves a closer look.\n\nOur scientists recommend an in depth survey of the planet to see what mysteries that can be uncovered.
STH_expedition.63.name: Three Year Mission 3: Planet Survey
STH_expedition.65.desc:
[sth_expedition_leader_3.GetName] has found a rare 'Gaia' class world filled with life, which our scientists suspect has been artificial created.

A large heavily shielded and abandoned facility appears to be at the centre of the mystery. We could spend the rest of the expedition studying the planet, however we must continue the mission.

We have flagged the planet for follow up study by a dedicated team.
STH_expedition.65.name: Three Year Mission 3: Strange New Worlds
STH_expedition.66.desc: Our teams have found a surplus of minerals produced as a by-product of the mysterious facility.\n\nWe believe we can collect some of these minerals and resources without harming the ecosystem.
STH_expedition.66.name: Three Year Mission 3: Strange New Worlds
STH_expedition.67.desc: Our scans have picked up the remains of an abandoned starbase which appears to be equipped with repair facilities adaptable to a wide variety of ships. There are no life signs aboard the station.
STH_expedition.67.name: Three Year Mission 3: Mysterious Starbase
STH_expedition.68.desc: Our survey teams found a number of strange looking pieces of equipment but were ultimately unable to restart the facility. The Captain was able to pick up some valuable experience, but sadly not a lot else.
STH_expedition.68.name: Three Year Mission 3: Mysterious Starbase
STH_expedition.69.desc: Our survey teams have uncovered the remains of the vast arrays of weapons outfitted onboard the station. Whilst consider ancient by our standards these weapons have a unique biological component that could still provide deadly.\n\nWe have two options, restart the facility and keep these deadly and unethical weapons or destroy the facility to ensure they can never be used to harm again.
STH_expedition.69.name: Three Year Mission 3: Ancient Starbase
STH_expedition.70.desc: Our teams have investigated the ruined base but were unable to uncover anything or value.\n\nIt seems we will never understand what happened here, the Captain marks the location in their log and orders the ship to continue on the mission.
STH_expedition.70.name: Three Year Mission 3: No data found
STH_expedition.71.desc: Our probes have found a pre-warp culture, and our on-board anthropologists would like to take a closer look whilst taking every precaution not to interfere with the development of these people. We maybe able to view a glimpse of how our own civilisation developed into the thriving culture we have today.
STH_expedition.71.name: Three Year Mission 3: Primitive Culture Found
STH_expedition.72.desc: The people on the planet below are fascinating, clearly undergoing a renaissance, exploring new forms of art and culture.\n\nWhilst extremely interesting, there is nothing further we can learn and we should continue the mission.
STH_expedition.72.name: Three Year Mission 3: Primitive Culture Found
STH_expedition.73.desc: [sth_expedition_leader_3.GetName] has uncovered a worrying sign, it appears that a dormant super volcano is on the verge of erupting.\n\nIt would wipe out the entire civilisation. The Prime Directive strictly states that we cannot interfere with the natural development of this civilisation, however not doing so would almost certainly result in the deaths of all on the surface, and the end of this emerging people.
STH_expedition.73.name: Three Year Mission 3: Primitive Culture - Disaster!
STH_expedition.74.desc: [Root.GetRulerTitle] [Root.GetRulerName] the mission report indicates that [sth_expedition_leader_3.GetName] was successful in saving the lives of all those on the planet.\n\nWho knows what impact this will have on the future? Our influence has had a direct impact on the natural development of this species. Let's hope it is for the better.
STH_expedition.74.name: Three Year Mission 3: Primitive Culture Saved
STH_expedition.75.desc: Despite the best efforts by all involved, the team were unable to evacuate the colony as the volcano erupted ahead of schedule and wiped out the settlement.\n\nUnfortunately none of the natives survived the eruption and ensuing ecological damage. It is time to move on.
STH_expedition.75.name: Three Year Mission 3: Unable to save primitive culture
STH_expedition.76.desc: [Root.GetRulerTitle] [Root.GetRulerName], I am sorry to report that our expedition has come to an early end.\n\nThe first officer has reported back that the Captain and senior members of the crew were killed in action attempting to save the lives of a primitive culture on a planet on the far edges of known space. It appears the rescue went wrong, and as a result we have ordered the crew home. The ship will be mothballed whilst a full internal investigation takes place.
STH_expedition.76.name: Three Year Mission 3: Crew lost
STH_expedition.77.desc: Scans have picked up a small civilian ship under attack by a number of attack fighters. Their ships shields are failing and they will not be able to last much longer.\n\nIt appears the aggressors have little interest in our ship, but that would change if we engage them. What are our orders sir?
STH_expedition.77.name: Three Year Mission 3: Ship Under Attack
STH_expedition.78.desc: The aggressors were no match for the skill and power of our ship and we managed to make a statement against those who would challenge the [Root.GetName].\n\nAs an added bonus we were able to collect a decent amount of salvage from the wreckage of the destroyed ship. We should collect it before moving on with the mission.
STH_expedition.78.name: Three Year Mission 3: Victory
STH_expedition.79.desc: [Root.GetRulerTitle] [Root.GetRulerName], I am sorry to report that our expedition has come to an early end. We picked up their distress call earlier today via our long range communications.\n\nIt appears they attempted to defend themselves against an unknown attacker but were ultimately unsuccessful. Sadly the ship appears to have been destroyed with all hands.
STH_expedition.79.name: Three Year Mission 3: Defeat
STH_expedition.8.desc: [sth_expedition_leader_1.GetName] has identified a rare planet on long range scans that could use a closer look. \n\nOur scientists recommend an in depth survey of the planet to see what mysteries that can be uncovered.
STH_expedition.8.name: Three Year Mission 1: Planet Survey
STH_expedition.80.desc_01: [Root.GetRulerTitle] [Root.GetRulerName], we have an excellent opportunity to provide our scientists back on [Root.Owner.Capital.GetName] with some research samples from a nearby nebula. Please divert course to take these samples from the nebula.
STH_expedition.80.desc_02: [sth_expedition_leader_3.GetName] one of our leading Generals has contacted us asking for us to complete an assignment for them. A long lost miliary probe has been detected close by and we have been tasked to recover it.
STH_expedition.80.name: Three Year Mission 3: Mission from Our Lead Scientists
STH_expedition.81.desc:
Arriving at the source of the distress call near the team has come across a passenger transport in trouble. 

Answering the hail, the [Root.Owner.GetCaptainTitle] of the freighter appears disheveled and injured. 

'Thank you for answering our distress call, [Root.Owner.GetCaptainTitle]. We're carrying passengers on a tour of the system, our warp drive was damaged in an Ion storm. 

An engineering team dispatched to the vessel is quickly able to repair the ship's engines.
STH_expedition.81.name: Three Year Mission 3: Distress Call
STH_expedition.82.desc: While not every distress call can be answered, each failure to respond to incidents reflects poorly on the [Root.GetName]'s reputation is this part of space.
STH_expedition.82.name: Three Year Mission 3: Distress Call
STH_expedition.83.desc: Thanks to our expert engineering team the volatile components were successfully jettisoned and the freighter was saved.\n\nWhilst the Captain of the freighter was angry at the loss of her precious cargo, they are willing to provide a small reward for our help.
STH_expedition.83.name: Three Year Mission 3: Freighter saved
STH_expedition.84.desc: We have been contacted by a local trader, who has a number of minerals they would be willing to trade with us.
STH_expedition.84.name: Three Year Mission 3: Trader Found
STH_expedition.9.desc_01:
On closer inspection the planet holds many exciting new discoveries including new species that have not been seen on any planet within our borders.

Our scientists could spend the next several years going through the new discoveries, but scans will have to do as we must continue with the mission.

[sth_expedition_leader_1.GetName] has gained a lot of experience from the brief time spent here.
STH_expedition.9.desc_02: The planet is teeming with exotic new animal species, but nothing of strategic value. It could be classed as an anthropologists dream.\n\nOur scientists have asked to spend the next couple of days cataloging the species they have seen from orbit. The knowledge gained here will go a long way to furthering our understanding of the evolution of our own planet.
STH_expedition.9.desc_03: Our scientists believe this to be a young world in the early stages of development demonstrating exceptional beauty and volatility, but little in terms of useful minerals or other salvageable resources. It has however provided useful experience for the ship and crew.
STH_expedition.9.name: Three Year Mission 1: Planet Survey
STH_expedition.9999.b: We will return to the Lembatta later.
STH_expedition.9999.desc_lembatta_enable: The Lembatta Cluster is a stellar cluster located near the border between the United Federation of Planets and the Klingon Empire, consisted mainly of large, old red giants, giving the Cluster its distinctive red colour. \n\nThe cluster emits high levels of radiation, which would normally make travel across the cluster impossible, however our science and expeditionary teams believe that we have sufficent technology levels to safely explore the cluster.
STH_expedition.9999.desc_lembatta_pendin: The Lembatta Cluster is a stellar cluster located near the border between the United Federation of Planets and the Klingon Empire, consisted mainly of large, old red giants, giving the Cluster its distinctive red colour. \n\nThe cluster emits high levels of radiation, which our science teams inform us is currently too dangerous for our ships to travel through, recommending at least level 4 warp technology.
STH_expedition.9999.name: Star Cluster Expeditions
STH_expedition_1.1002.desc: [Root.GetRulerTitle] [Root.GetRulerName], I am receiving reports that following a battle we have picked up reports of [Root.GetName] escape pods and debris coming from the last known location of our expeditionary fleet. We have dispatched a team to retrieve the survivors and bring them home.
STH_expedition_1.1002.name: Ship Destroyed, escape pods found!
STH_expedition_4.500.desc: Captains Log: Captain [sth_expedition_hero_Leader_1.GetName] updating whilst on an expedition, my communications officer has reported we have received the location of a previously undiscovered empire. \n\nShould we proceed with First Contact?
STH_expedition_4.500.name: New Empire Discovered!
STH_expedition_4.510.desc: Captains Log: Captain [sth_expedition_hero_Leader_1.GetName] reporting in from our expedition. Whilst exploring a previously unclaimed region of space we have been approached by a vessel from [expedition_4_tresspass_country.GetName], they have not stated their intentions, but their demeanor is clearly not friendly.
STH_expedition_4.510.name: Ship Approaching
STH_expedition_4.511.desc_01: Greeting Captain [sth_expedition_hero_Leader_1.GetName], we notice that your ship appears to have wandered into territory that has recently been claimed by [expedition_4_tresspass_country.GetName], no doubt you were unaware of this and already planning on leaving?
STH_expedition_4.511.desc_02: Attention Captain [sth_expedition_hero_Leader_1.GetName], your vessel has trespassed in recently claimed [expedition_4_tresspass_country.GetName] territory, you will vacate this region immediately and hand over any research that you illegally obtained, before we turn our ships weapons on you.
STH_expedition_4.511.desc_03: You are in the space of [expedition_4_tresspass_country.GetName] we do not care why you are here, only that you leave now!
STH_expedition_4.511.desc_04: Hello Captain [sth_expedition_hero_Leader_1.GetName], you may not be aware that we have laid claim to this region and the research opportunities within, we do not desire conflict, but we are not looking to share this region of space. For now, we are content to discuss the situation peacefully.
STH_expedition_4.511.name: Inbound Communications
STH_expedition_4.512.desc_01: You speak well [sth_expedition_hero_Leader_1.GetName], if this is how all members of your species do business then perhaps there is hope for a better relationship between [Root.GetName] and my people.
STH_expedition_4.512.desc_02: Hmmm you have convinced us for now Captain, but only just we shall let this incident pass and allow you to continue on your way with no further ill will between our two sides.. But do not test our patience again.
STH_expedition_4.512.desc_03: You are perhaps lucky that your vessel is so well-armed and that we are not equipped to do battle today. We concede and you may continue on your way with the begrudging respect of those you have faced today.
STH_expedition_4.512.name: Inbound Communications
STH_expedition_4.513.desc_01: If you think that pathetic attempt at convincing us stood any chance of succeeding then you are a bigger fool than we 1st thought [sth_expedition_hero_Leader_1.GetSpeciesName], you will leave our territory now or you will leave it chased by torpedoes!
STH_expedition_4.513.desc_02: Despite your best attempts and obvious charm, our leadership remains unconvinced that we should allow you to remain in our space, so with regret we must asked you to leave or risk a much larger diplomatic incident.
STH_expedition_4.513.desc_03: Your pathetic attempts to force us to back down have only strengthened our resolve to see the back of your Starship. Leave our space now or we open fire!
STH_expedition_4.513.name: Inbound Communications
STH_expedition_4.514.desc_01: Having discussed the conflict with [sth_expedition_hero_Leader_1.GetSpeciesName] we see that nothing can be gained from continued conflict here and whilst we remain unhappy that this situation has occurred, we shall overlook it for now. Take your readings and move on before we change our mind.
STH_expedition_4.514.desc_02: We have evaluated the situation tactically and can see that both our ships are evenly matched a battle here today would not be in anyone's best interests, I suggest we both take what we need from this system and depart without the use of weaponary.
STH_expedition_4.514.desc_03: Your pathetic attempts to force us to back down have only strengthened our resolve to see the back of your Starship. Leave our space now or we open fire!
STH_expedition_4.514.name: Inbound Communications
STH_expedition_4.520.desc: Captains Log: Captain [sth_expedition_hero_Leader_1.GetName] reporting in from our expedition. whilst traversing deep space we have been contacted by [STH_expedition_4_rival_1.GetName] and [STH_expedition_4_rival_2.GetName]. Two rival empires who are spiralling closer and closer to the brink of war. We have been asked to facilitate a conference between the two sides in a bid to stablise the region.
STH_expedition_4.520.name: Diplomatic Conference
STH_expedition_4.521.desc: We have been approached by [sth_expedition_hero_Leader_1.GetName] of the [From.GetName] offering to host a conference between us and our rivals [STH_expedition_4_rival_2.GetName].
STH_expedition_4.521.name: Diplomatic Conference
STH_expedition_4.522.desc: We have been approached by [sth_expedition_hero_Leader_1.GetName] of the [From.GetName] offering to host a conference between us and our rivals [STH_expedition_4_rival_1.GetName].
STH_expedition_4.522.name: Diplomatic Conference.
STH_expedition_4.523.desc: Despite the best efforts of [sth_expedition_hero_Leader_1.GetName] and their crew, it appears [STH_expedition_4_rival_1.GetName] are unwilling to engage in talks with their rivals, it seems that they are not interesting in talking with their foes.
STH_expedition_4.523.name: Diplomatic Conference Rejected
STH_expedition_4.524.desc: Despite the best efforts of [sth_expedition_hero_Leader_1.GetName] and their crew, it appears [STH_expedition_4_rival_2.GetName] are unwilling to engage in talks with their rivals, it seems that they are not interesting in talking with their foes.
STH_expedition_4.524.name: Diplomatic Conference Rejected
STH_expedition_4.525.desc: It appears [STH_expedition_4_rival_2.GetName] are unwilling to engage in talks with us, perhaps they are too afraid to engage with us.
STH_expedition_4.525.name: Diplomatic Conference Rejected
STH_expedition_4.526.desc: It appears that both [STH_expedition_4_rival_1.GetName] and [STH_expedition_4_rival_2.GetName] have been persuaded by [sth_expedition_hero_Leader_1.GetName] to come together for peace talks hosted onboard [sth_expedition_hero_Leader_1.GetName]'s ship.
STH_expedition_4.526.name: Diplomatic Conference Accepted
STH_expedition_4.527.desc: The diplomatic conference has been agreed and both sides will be in attendance.
STH_expedition_4.527.name: Diplomatic Conference Accepted
STH_expedition_4.528.desc: Following an intense series of discussions with [STH_expedition_4_rival_1.GetName] and [STH_expedition_4_rival_2.GetName] a major breakthrough has been made providing a significant improvement in the relationship between both countries. \n\nEnvoys from both side credit the work done by [sth_expedition_hero_Leader_1.GetName] as having a huge influence on the success of the talks.
STH_expedition_4.528.name: Diplomatic Success
STH_expedition_4.529.desc: As all parties leave the conference room, it is clear that no agreement has been reached, with the situation possibly even having worsened. The likelihood of peace being brokered anytime soon seems further away following the meeting.
STH_expedition_4.529.name: Diplomatic Failure
STH_expedition_4.530.desc_01: Captains Log: Captain [sth_expedition_hero_Leader_1.GetName] reporting in from our expedition. We have been approached by an individual fleeing the [STH_expedition_4_530_a_target.GetName] they claim to be a high-ranking civilian industrialist who has important intel on his former employers and is willing to share in exchange for asylum. \n\nWhilst [STH_expedition_4_530_a_target.GetName] will be unlikely to be able to prove we are sheltering their former citizen, it is likely they will still suspect our involvement.
STH_expedition_4.530.desc_02: Captains Log: Captain [sth_expedition_hero_Leader_1.GetName] reporting in from our expedition. We have been hailed by a trader who claims to have intel on [STH_expedition_4_530_b_target.GetName], our security experts have taken a look at the findings and believe that whilst most of the information on sale is worthless, there are elements of useful data within the offering. \n\nThis information is on sale for a no doubt inflated Latinum price.
STH_expedition_4.530.desc_03: Captains Log: Captain [sth_expedition_hero_Leader_1.GetName] reporting in from our expedition. [Root.GetName] Intel has contacted us, to request we extract one of their operatives, who has been operating undercover within [STH_expedition_4_530_c_target.GetName] space. \n\nThe data obtained will no doubt be of the highest quality, but retrieving will come at a cost.
STH_expedition_4.530.name: Intelligence Report Received
STH_expedition_situations.1050.desc_01: Sufficient information has been gained on the Lembatta Cluster, that the Science Council has agreed to authorise a new Five Year Mission into the Cluster.
STH_expedition_situations.1050.name: Five Year Mission Available
STH_expedition_situations.50.desc_01: The [This.GetName] stands ready to join the ongoing expedition into the Lembatta Cluster to begin the survey mission across the cluster to chart the space and investigate the mysteries of this area of the galaxy.
STH_expedition_situations.50.desc_02: The [This.GetName] stands at the gateway system to the Lembatta Cluster, ready to begin the expedition into the heart of the Cluster on behalf of the [This.Owner.GetName]. Over the course of the expedition new missions will be available and exciting content will unlock.
STH_expedition_situations.50.name: Expedition to the Lembatta Cluster
STH_expedition_situations.55.desc_01: With the expedition to the Lembatta Cluster drawing to a close, the ships assigned to the survey can begin to pack up their sensor equipment and round up their scientists and set a course for home. \n\nWith the Cluster fully charted we can now lay claim to the area.
STH_expedition_situations.55.name: Expedition to Cluster Complete
STH_federation_council.1.a: We wage this war to defend the ideals of the Federation.
STH_federation_council.1.b: We are seeking a swift end to the conflict.
STH_federation_council.1.d: Give a passionate speach in favour of unity.
STH_federation_council.1.desc_01: [Root.GetRulerTitle] [Root.GetRulerName], this is Federational council member [council_member.ruler.GetName] representing the interests of [council_member.GetName]. We have grave concerns that need to be addressed by the Federation Council and we demand an audience and we request an emergency session with yourself to discuss our issues.
STH_federation_council.1.desc_02: Pleasant greeting [Root.GetRulerTitle] [Root.GetRulerName], I am Federational council member [council_member.ruler.GetName] representing the interests of [council_member.GetName]. It is always good to join a council session and discuss Federation policies.
STH_federation_council.1.desc_03: Hello [Root.GetRulerTitle] [Root.GetRulerName], I am Federational council member [council_member.ruler.GetName] representing the interests of [council_member.GetName] the recent declaration of war against [ufp_war_country.GetName] has us extremely concerned. The Federation is supposed to idealise peace and harmony, which is why we have joined this grand union. This war has us worried about the future of the United Federation of Planets and what it impact it will have on our core principles.
STH_federation_council.1.e: Offer to send a team to their homeworld.
STH_federation_council.1.name: United Federation of Planets Council Session
STH_federation_council.1.z: Bring Council Session to an end.
STH_federation_council.10.desc: The emergency council session on [ufp_member_war_concerns.capital_scope.GetName] was a success thanks in part to the efforts of [ufp_envoy.GetName] and [ufp_ship_leader.GetName]. The experience of the team was able to convince the politicians that whilst war is never the desired result sometimes a stance must be taken. The Federation council is once again united.
STH_federation_council.10.name: Federation War Council Emergency Session
STH_federation_council.100.a: What is the role of the council.
STH_federation_council.100.c: How often can the council be called.
STH_federation_council.100.desc: With the formation of the United Federation of Planets, the founding members establish the Federation Council, a democratic voice with a seat for all members of the Federation. The council can be called for an extraordinary session to enact matters of importance to the Federation and Starfleet.
STH_federation_council.100.name: Federation Council Formed
STH_federation_council.102.b: Why am I unable to make a decision today.
STH_federation_council.102.desc_01: Greetings President [root.GetRulerName], the United Federation of Planets extra-ordinary session of the council is now in session. There are a number of topics on the table for discussion today.
STH_federation_council.102.desc_02: Greetings President [root.GetRulerName], the Federation Council is still reconvening following the previous session, please allow us more time before calling the next unplanned session.
STH_federation_council.102.f.tooltip: Warning: This is a resource intensive activity and can only be done every 90 days.
STH_federation_council.102.f: Share all Tech with Member Worlds.
STH_federation_council.102.name: Federation Council Session
STH_federation_council.11.desc: The emergency council session on [ufp_member_war_concerns.capital_scope.GetName] was a failure despite the efforts of [ufp_envoy.GetName] and [ufp_ship_leader.GetName]. The government of [ufp_member_war_concerns.GetName] remain steadfast in their view that all war is wrong and they remain vocal in this view at every opportunity.
STH_federation_council.11.name: Federation War Council Emergency Session
STH_federation_council.110.desc: Greetings President, I am [ufp_war_member.GetName] leader of the pro-war faction within the Federation Council, we have won the vote on providing extra support to aid us in the war. \n\nWe can provide a small bonus which should help Starfleet prevail.
STH_federation_council.110.name: Federation Council Session
STH_federation_council.111.desc: Greetings President, I am [ufp_war_peace.GetName] leader of the pro-peace faction within the Federation Council. We have won the vote and we cannot provide an additional offensive bonus in this war, which is costing the lives of many of our brave officers. \n\nWe have agreed on a small defensive bonus to help ensure our forces can protect our brave citizens.
STH_federation_council.111.name: Federation Council Session
STH_federation_council.12.desc: Failure to attend the conference set up to discuss the war effort has led to [ufp_member_war_concerns.GetName] feeling undervalued and unappreciated as part of the Federation council, they have made it clear that should they continue to be made to feel this way they will strongly consider their place within the United Federation of Planets.
STH_federation_council.12.name: Federation War Council Emergency Session
STH_federation_council.15.desc: Greetings [Root.GetRulerTitle] [Root.GetRulerName]! \n\nWe want to commend the success of Starfleet in their recent victory and let them know that all of the Federation is behind them and the people of [ufp_war_good.GetName] support the brave efforts of our troops! Let's win this war for all of the United Federation of Planets.
STH_federation_council.15.name: Federation War Council Emergency Session
STH_federation_council.20.b: We shall arrange a conference between both sides.
STH_federation_council.20.desc: Greetings [Root.GetRulerTitle] [Root.GetRulerName], we wish to discuss the ongoing plans to bring [fed_pacifist_state.GetName] into the United Federation of Planets, we have researched the ethics of this state and have some concerns about their pacifistic views and whether this will weaken the position of Starfleet and allow other nations to take advantage of the United Federation of Planets. \n\nI look forward to your response [Root.GetRulerTitle].
STH_federation_council.20.name: Federation Council Session
STH_federation_council.200.desc: With the Federation Council in place, the council sets about the business of bringing the founding worlds together as one organisation. \n\nThe construction of a new Starbase, simply called Starbase 1 on the site of one of the oldest starbases in our home system seems both logical and symbolic.
STH_federation_council.200.name: The First Federation Starbase
STH_federation_council.21.desc: Federation councils have arranged a conference between [fed_pacifist_state.GetName] and the concerned dignitaries from Member World [fed_concerned_state.GetName] to be held on the homeworld of [fed_pacifist_state.capital_scope.GetName]. \n\nThe Federation ambassador for [fed_concerned_state.GetName] needs to be escorted from their homeworld to meet with [fed_pacifist_state_leader.GetName].
STH_federation_council.21.name: Federation Diplomatic Escort
STH_federation_council.22.desc: Federation councils have arranged a conference between [fed_military_state.GetName] and the concerned dignitaries from Member World [fed_concerned_state.GetName] to be held on the homeworld of [fed_military_state.capital_scope.GetName]. \n\nThe Federation ambassador for [fed_concerned_state.GetName] needs to be escorted from their homeworld to meet with [fed_military_state_leader.GetName].
STH_federation_council.22.name: Federation Diplomatic Escort
STH_federation_council.23.a: Prepare to depart for the next destination.
STH_federation_council.23.b: Set a course for the next destination.
STH_federation_council.23.desc: The crew of the [diplomatic_ship.GetName] have successfully picked up the diplomats from [fed_concerned_state.capital_scope.GetName] and are now prepared to escort them to the awaiting conference that has been arranged on [fed_new_state.capital_scope.GetName]. \n\nAll of the Federation are eagerly awaiting the results of the conference and the resumption of a united federation council.
STH_federation_council.23.name: Federation Diplomatic Escort
STH_federation_council.24.desc: Federation diplomats met with the potential new Federation member to discuss the concerns and it looks like the spirit of the Federations original charter was able to help both sides understand the different philosophies and how they strengthen the ideals the Federation was built on by it's founders.
STH_federation_council.24.name: Federation Diplomatic Escort
STH_federation_council.25.desc: Failure to attend the planned conference has resulted in insult to both sides and a lot of anger being vented back in the Federation Council chambers. \n\nHopefully our diplomatic service can undo some of this damage.
STH_federation_council.25.name: Federation Diplomatic Escort
STH_federation_council.26.b: We shall arrange a conference between both sides.
STH_federation_council.26.desc: Greetings [Root.GetRulerTitle] [Root.GetRulerName], we would like to take some time to discuss the ongoing plans to bring [fed_military_state.GetName] into the United Federation of Planets, we have understand that this new state are not afraid of taking the military route and we have some concerns about whether this will create a dangerous tone within the United Federation of Planets. \n\nYour urgent response would be appreciated [Root.GetRulerTitle].
STH_federation_council.26.name: Federation Council Session
STH_federation_council.27.a: The Federation values welcome and embrace all.
STH_federation_council.27.b: We shall arrange a conference between both sides.
STH_federation_council.27.desc: Greetings [Root.GetRulerTitle] [Root.GetRulerName], we would like to take some time to discuss the ongoing plans to bring [fed_auth_state.GetName] into the United Federation of Planets, the rights of all members of this great union is at the core of our egalitarian beliefs and we find it hard to understand what [fed_auth_state.GetName] will bring to the table or how they will fit into the federation family. \n\nPlease help us understand.
STH_federation_council.27.name: Federation Council Session
STH_federation_council.28.desc: Federation councils have arranged a conference between [fed_auth_state.GetName] and the concerned dignitaries from Member World [fed_concerned_state.GetName] to be held on the homeworld of [fed_auth_state.capital_scope.GetName]. \n\nThe Federation ambassador for [fed_concerned_state.GetName] needs to be escorted from their homeworld to meet with [fed_auth_state_leader.GetName].
STH_federation_council.28.name: Federation Diplomatic Escort
STH_federation_council.3.a: We will arrange a council session.
STH_federation_council.3.b: We are at war, now is not the time!
STH_federation_council.3.desc: Following the outbreak of the war against [ufp_war_country.GetName] the Federation council representative on behalf of the member world [ufp_member_war_concerns.GetName] has requested an urgent session of the Federation council to be held to discuss their concerns about the war. They have requested that we contact them immediately via the Contact screen to discuss their concerns.
STH_federation_council.3.name: Federation War Council Emergency Session
STH_federation_council.301.desc: Dear [Root.GetName], we come to you in need of aid, we have critical resource shortages and we request your aid to deliver these much-needed supplies to our capital. \n\nWe hope you live up to your end of our subject agreement.
STH_federation_council.301.name: Request for Aid
STH_federation_council.302.desc_01: We have successfully delivered the energy cells to [subject_in_need.capital_scope.GetName] and the teams have begun working on providing assistance to their infrastructure to help them help themselves.
STH_federation_council.302.desc_02: We have successfully delivered the package of minerals to [subject_in_need.capital_scope.GetName] and the teams have begun working on improving the mining facilities on the planet to aid [subject_in_need.GetName] in the future. \n\nAdditional our engineers have installed a new Matter Fabricator at their capital.
STH_federation_council.302.desc_03: We have successfully provided the delivery Food to [subject_in_need.capital_scope.GetName] and the teams have worked on the fields providing tools and crops to aid them in future harvests. \n\nThe new farm will provide food for future generations.
STH_federation_council.302.desc_04: We have successfully delivered the agreed Alloys to [subject_in_need.capital_scope.GetName] and the teams have begun working on providing assistance to their infrastructure to help them help themselves.
STH_federation_council.302.desc_05: We have successfully delivered the agreed Dilithium Crystals to [subject_in_need.capital_scope.GetName] and the teams have begun working on a new synthetic Dilithium manufacturing facility to aid in their navy production capacity.
STH_federation_council.302.name: Resource Convoy Arrives
STH_federation_council.303.desc: You have failed to provide us with the agreed aid as we have discussed, and this has seriously impacted our faith in you!
STH_federation_council.303.name: Failed to provide agreed aid
STH_federation_council.304.desc: A band of pirates have intercepted the convoy before it can reach its destination. Defend the shipment and ensure that it reaches its destination.
STH_federation_council.304.name: Pirates Attack
STH_federation_council.4.a.tooltip: Our Starfleet crews are buoyed by the support from the Federation member worlds.
STH_federation_council.4.a: Starfleet will act swiftly to bring us victory.
STH_federation_council.4.desc: Greetings [Root.GetRulerName] we have considered your impassioned speech and whilst our stance on war remains unchanged, we understand that this attack against the principles in which the Federation holds most dear cannot remain undefended. We ask that our brave Starfleet officers do their best to end this conflict swiftly and with minimal casualties.
STH_federation_council.4.name: Federation War Council Emergency Session
STH_federation_council.5.b: Send a diplomatic team to discuss the war.
STH_federation_council.5.desc: Hello [Root.GetRulerName] we have considered the message given in the last Federation council meeting and whilst we understand the reasoning on why you feel you must lead this Federation into a war, we must stand firm behind our pacifist views and lodge an official protest against this war.
STH_federation_council.5.name: Federation War Council Emergency Session
STH_federation_council.6.desc: The [ufp_member_war_concerns.GetName] have accepted our offer to send an envoy escorted by one of our Starships. The team will attempt to offset the fears of the [ufp_member_war_concerns.GetName] government and despite the ongoing war this is a vitally important mission to for the Federation council to ensure that it remains unified during this trying time. Our envoy [ufp_envoy.GetName] will accompany the ship and crew to [ufp_member_war_concerns.capital_scope.GetName].
STH_federation_council.6.name: Federation War Council Emergency Session
STH_federation_council.7.a: We cannot let this distract us.
STH_federation_council.7.desc: The [ufp_member_war_concerns.GetName] have rejected our offer further discuss the ongoing war efforts and have formally lodged a complaint at the Federation council, this lack of cohesion within our member worlds will only seek to embolden our enemies efforts to undermine Starfleet's efforts.
STH_federation_council.7.name: Federation War Council Emergency Session
STH_federation_council.8.desc: Federation member world [ufp_member_war_concerns.GetName] has formally lodged an objection against the ongoing war and feel they have been brought into a war against their wishes. Their view of the United Federation of Planets has been harmed as a result.
STH_federation_council.8.name: Federation War Council Emergency Session
STH_federation_council.9.desc: What started off as a small debate over the ongoing war effort has escalated as the government on [ufp_member_war_concerns.capital_scope.GetName] have been lobbying against the war. They have gained a number of key allies in the Federation council chambers as fellow member worlds [ufp_member_war_concerns_1.GetName], [ufp_member_war_concerns_2.GetName] have joined their voices together against the war and protesting against how the situation has been handled by the Federation leadership and Starfleet's admiralty.
STH_federation_council.9.name: Federation War Council Emergency Session
STH_federation_flavour.1.a.tooltip: Meeting with Kai [bajoranKai.GetName] scheduled within 24 to 36 days.
STH_federation_flavour.1.a: Schedule a meeting with the Kai.
STH_federation_flavour.1.b: The dress code is there for a reason.
STH_federation_flavour.1.desc:
The unique position the [bajoran_republic.GetSpeciesName] Faith enjoys among the [bajoran_republic.GetSpeciesNamePlural] has at times posed a problem to the diplomats and civil servants engaged in [bajoran_republic.Capital.GetName]'s accession process.

While most issues that have emerged are quickly resolved, one seemingly minor point has escalated to the point that the leader of the [bajoran_republic.GetSpeciesName] Faith, Kai [bajoranKai.GetName], has requested an audience with [Root.GetRulerTitle] [Root.GetRulerName] to resolve the issue.

The issue concerns the Starfleet dress code and its amendment to allow [bajoran_republic.GetSpeciesNamePlural] officers to wear the family earrings, which form one of the more visible components of their religion.
STH_federation_flavour.1.name: [bajoran_republic.GetName] Accession Process
STH_federation_flavour.10.desc: [diplomacy_leader.GetName]'s efforts on [From.GetName] have been successful and the previous objections to the ongoing integration of the Ferengi have been dropped. The strength and unity of the Federation continues to grow.
STH_federation_flavour.10.name: Successful Negotiations
STH_federation_flavour.100.a.tooltip: High chance to shift [accessionState.GetName] ethics toward Egalitarianism.
STH_federation_flavour.100.b.tooltip: Moderate chance to shift [accessionState.GetName] ethics toward Egalitarianism.
STH_federation_flavour.100.desc:
Greetings [Root.GetRulerTitle] [Root.GetRulerName]. Talks to bring the [accessionState.GetSpeciesName] people into the [Root.GetName] are progressing, but there remains a number of questions around the different... worldviews we hold in certain areas.

We are told that diversity is strength, but how can we reconcile my people's tendency toward a decisive state and hierarchical social order with your 'egalitarianism'? 

I am open to any suggestions you may have.
STH_federation_flavour.100.name: [accessionState.GetName] Accession Process
STH_federation_flavour.101.a.tooltip: High chance to shift [accessionState.GetName] ethics toward Pacifism.
STH_federation_flavour.101.b.tooltip: Moderate chance to shift [accessionState.GetName] ethics toward Pacifism.
STH_federation_flavour.101.desc:
Greetings [Root.GetRulerTitle] [Root.GetRulerName]. Talks to bring the [accessionState.GetSpeciesName] people into the [Root.GetName] are progressing, but there remains a number of questions around the different... worldviews we hold in certain areas.

We are told that diversity is strength, but how can we reconcile my people's tendency towards the use of force to achieve peace with your 'pacifism'?

I am open to any suggestions you may have.
STH_federation_flavour.101.name: [accessionState.GetName] Accession Process
STH_federation_flavour.102.a.tooltip: High chance to shift [accessionState.GetName] ethics toward Xenophilia.
STH_federation_flavour.102.b.tooltip: Moderate chance to shift [accessionState.GetName] ethics toward Xenophilia.
STH_federation_flavour.102.desc:
Greetings [Root.GetRulerTitle] [Root.GetRulerName]. Talks to bring the [accessionState.GetSpeciesName] people into the [Root.GetName] are progressing, but there remains a number of questions around the different... worldviews we hold in certain areas.

We are told that diversity is strength, but how can we reconcile my people's mistrust of aliens and alien cultures with your 'xenophilia'?

I am open to any suggestions you may have.
STH_federation_flavour.102.name: [accessionState.GetName] Accession Process
STH_federation_flavour.105.a.tooltip: Agree on a special project to demonstrate Starfleet's abilities, better leaders & squadron commanders have a higher chance of success.
STH_federation_flavour.105.desc: Greetings, I am [accessionStateLeader.GetName] representing [accessionState.GetName], as you well know we are a proud society with a strong and proud military, many amongst our admiralty have raised concerns about your ability to protect our planet, with Starfleet being seen as more of a scientific organisation and not fit to protect our interests.
STH_federation_flavour.105.name: [From.GetName] Membership Process
STH_federation_flavour.106.desc: After a fine demonstration of fleet power and coordination by [diplomacy_leader.GetName] onboard [This.GetName], the integration of our potential member world can now continue with both sides pleased with the outcome of the fleet activity.
STH_federation_flavour.106.name: Fleet Operations Successful
STH_federation_flavour.107.desc: Despite a good display of our fleet capabilities [diplomacy_leader.GetName] could not convince our integration target of the abilities of Starfleet. This is a significant setback to the membership process.
STH_federation_flavour.107.name: Fleet Operations Failed
STH_federation_flavour.108.desc: Greetings, I am [accessionStateLeader.GetName] representing [accessionState.GetName], as you know we value peace and we have seen our peaceful ways taken advantage of over the years, we are keen for reassurance that Starfleet will be able to protect us without becoming a war mongering society.
STH_federation_flavour.108.name: [From.GetName] Membership Process
STH_federation_flavour.109.desc: After a fine demonstration of the skill and abilities of [diplomacy_leader.GetName] onboard [This.GetName], the integration of our potential member world can now continue with both sides pleased with the outcome of the fleet activity.
STH_federation_flavour.109.name: Fleet Operations Successful
STH_federation_flavour.11.desc: [diplomacy_leader.GetName]'s efforts on [From.GetName] have failed to resolve the member world's concerns and harmed the overall efforts to integrate the Ferengi into the [Root.Owner.GetName].
STH_federation_flavour.11.name: Failed Negotiations
STH_federation_flavour.110.desc: Despite a good display of our fleet capabilities [diplomacy_leader.GetName] could not convince our integration target of the abilities of Starfleet, it's unclear if they saw the display as too aggressive or not going far enough to protect them, but it has set back the integration process.
STH_federation_flavour.110.name: Fleet Operations Failed
STH_federation_flavour.111.desc: Captain's Log - Captain [accessionStateLeader.GetName]: With the ongoing negotiations to bring [From.GetName] into [Root.GetName] in full swing, Starfleet has tasked us with an important diplomatic mission to [From.capital_scope.GetName] to provide some additional impetus to the ongoing discussions and help smooth out some of the sticking points. \n\nWe shall make our way to their homeworld and demonstrate the best that [Root.GetName] has to offer.
STH_federation_flavour.111.name: Diplomatic Mission
STH_federation_flavour.112.desc: Reports are in from [diplomacy_leader.GetName] with word returning that the recent diplomatic conference went well, [diplomacy_leader.GetName] was able to demonstrate the finer nuances of [Root.GetName], even managing to smooth out many issues within the negotiation process.
STH_federation_flavour.112.name: Successful Diplomatic Mission
STH_federation_flavour.113.desc: Concerning reports are being raised by [diplomacy_leader.GetName], despite a series of long conversations and diplomatic meets the Captain and their team were unable to add any momentum to the integration talks, and more concerning a number of new issues have now been raised.
STH_federation_flavour.113.name: Unsuccessful Diplomatic Mission
STH_federation_flavour.114.desc: Greetings [Root.GetRulerName], I am representing the Trill Symbiosis Commission, for a long time we Trill have kept the nature of our symbiotic nature existence, but with our joining the Federation, we feel the need to declare the secrets of the Trill. \n\nWe require your support to ensure the continued existence of our way of life and our very nature.
STH_federation_flavour.114.name: Trill Symbiosis Commission
STH_federation_flavour.115.desc_01: My name is [accessionStateLeader.GetName] and I have been part of the [From.GetName] military for many years and I want to publicly back the [From.GetName]'s plans to join the [Root.GetName] together we will build a stronger alliance and a safer galaxy!
STH_federation_flavour.115.desc_02: To my fellow scientists, my name is [accessionStateLeader.GetName] and I speak on behalf of many within the scientific community of [From.GetName], we welcome the opportunity to unite with the many fine Federation scientists and are excited by the prospect of uniting our Science institutions and research centres. We look forward to the many breakthroughs we will bring forth together.
STH_federation_flavour.115.desc_03: The government of [From.GetName] have been working hard with our friends from the [Root.GetName] and I want to publically thank all involved and declare how excited we all are at the prospect of joining this great alliance.
STH_federation_flavour.115.name: High Profile Leader Backs Federation Integration
STH_federation_flavour.116.desc_01: Admirals! I am [accessionStateLeader.GetName], an admiral in the [From.GetName] fleet and we have protected our empire from threats for many years, what assurances can be given that letting outsiders provide our protection will keep us safe?
STH_federation_flavour.116.desc_02: Hello, my name is [accessionStateLeader.GetName] and I represent the Scientific community within [From.GetName], while many are excited to work with you, many of us are concerned that our ongoing work will not be a priority and years of hard work could be lost!
STH_federation_flavour.116.desc_03: I am calling out the bureaucratic nature of the Federation! How do we prevent our empire from being swallowed up in the behemoth nature that is [Root.GetName]... I publicly question whether this is a sensible move for us!
STH_federation_flavour.116.name: High Profile Leader rejects Federation Integration
STH_federation_flavour.117.desc: Qapla' Federation allies! As we unite our forces to create a new power in the quadrant, we must first agree on how we tackle our Great Houses, many warriors operate the Great House fleets who would be eager and deserve the chance to join the ranks of Starfleet. \n\nAgreeing to this will transfer all Great House military fleets to [Root.GetName] control within the next year.
STH_federation_flavour.117.name: The Great Houses
STH_federation_flavour.118.desc: As per the agreement in the Integration of the Klingon Empire process, the Great House military assets have now been transferred to Starfleet control.
STH_federation_flavour.118.name: The Great House Fleets
STH_federation_flavour.12.desc_01: As the diplomats working to integrate the Husnock into the Federation continue the process a theme continues to crop up, the Husnock military are insisting on adorining their uniforms with the ancient symbols of their clans, this would require an allowance from our uniform policy, but would smooth out some of the issues being raised.
STH_federation_flavour.12.desc_02: The Bolian delegates involved with their integration into the Federation have approached us with a request, the Bolians are asking if they can continue to wear their ceremonial jewelry under their Starfleet uniforms, so long as it does not interfere with operational effectiveness.
STH_federation_flavour.12.desc_03: Our diplomat services wish to discuss an important matter with us, the Rigellian Consortium are currently undergoing integration into the [Root.GetName], but are now raising an important matter, their military personnel in scope for transfer into Starfleet would like to make us aware that the facial marking and items that adorn their long hair carry cultural significance to them, and whilst it may not strictly adhere to the set uniform code, it is as much a part of them as their skin.
STH_federation_flavour.12.desc_04: The [From.GetName] would like to be granted permission to continue to wear the headdresses that play a key part of their society and feel this is an important part of accepting a position within the Federation.
STH_federation_flavour.12.desc_05: The [From.GetName] would like to be granted permission to continue to wear the head coverings, that play a key part of their society and feel this is an important part of accepting a position within the Federation.
STH_federation_flavour.12.desc_06: The [From.GetName] would like to be granted permission to continue to wear their traditional facial decorations, which play a key part in their society and feel this is an important part of accepting a position within the Federation.
STH_federation_flavour.12.desc_07: The [From.GetName] would like to be granted permission to continue to wear their traditional facial decorations, which play a key part in their society and feel this is an important part of accepting a position within the Federation.
STH_federation_flavour.12.desc_08: The Antedians are asking if their serving crew and officers would be allowed to bring onboard a crate of vermicula, despite the likely objections and potential environmental concerns. They have promised to keep the creatures out of sight and within their own living spaces.
STH_federation_flavour.12.desc_09: The process that the Tamarian's have had to undertake to join [Root.GetName] has been particularly challenging, the cultural and linguistic issues have made the early discussions a challenge, but both sides have made good progress. However, a new sticking point has arisen their leadership wishes for all Tamarian officers to be allowed to carry a small ceremonial dagger on their persons, these items are considered to be talismans.
STH_federation_flavour.12.desc_10: The Talaxian sense of style is well known across the Delta Quadrant, now that they are looking to join the [Root.GetName] they are asking to bring a small piece of this style to the standard Federation undergarments. Allowing the request would provide a timely boost to the ongoing membership integration efforts.
STH_federation_flavour.12.name: Federation Membership
STH_federation_flavour.120.desc_01: Good day [accessionStateLeader.GetName], our Integration negotiation teams have informed us of some concerning policies regarding your treatment of males within your society. \n\nThe Federation insists on equal rights of all individuals and this remains a key cornerstone of our society.
STH_federation_flavour.120.desc_02: Hello [accessionStateLeader.GetName], our Integration negotiation teams have informed us of some concerning policies regarding your treatment of females within your society. \n\nThe Federation insists on equal rights of all individuals, which remains a key cornerstone of our society.
STH_federation_flavour.120.name: Gender Policy Concerns
STH_federation_flavour.121.desc_01: The Federation has insisted that we review and change our long-standing misandrist policies before we are allowed to become a Member World.
STH_federation_flavour.121.desc_02: The Federation has insisted that we review and change our long-standing misogynist policies before we are allowed to become a Member World.
STH_federation_flavour.121.name: Gender Policy Concerns
STH_federation_flavour.122.desc_01: Our negotiation teams working with [From.GetName] has confirmed the former misandrist empire has agreed to the reforms and will be pursuing more gender-equal policies from now on.
STH_federation_flavour.122.desc_02: Our negotiation teams working with [From.GetName] has confirmed the former misogynist empire has agreed to the reforms and will be pursuing more gender-equal policies from now on.
STH_federation_flavour.122.name: Gender Policy Reformed
STH_federation_flavour.123.desc_01: Our negotiation teams working with [From.GetName] has confirmed our attempts to reform the misandrist empire have failed, their views are too deeply entrenched within their society. This will significantly impact their integration into the [Root.GetName].
STH_federation_flavour.123.desc_02: Our negotiation teams working with [From.GetName] has confirmed our attempts to reform the misogynist empire have failed, their views are too deeply entrenched within their society. This will significantly impact their integration into the [Root.GetName].
STH_federation_flavour.123.name: Gender Policy Rejected
STH_federation_flavour.124.desc: President! We wish to strongly object to your agreement to allow these misandrist views within the Federation, our union stands for equality for all and your decision makes a mockery of all that we stand for!
STH_federation_flavour.124.name: Formal Objection from [STH_federation_flavour_120_country.GetName]
STH_federation_flavour.125.desc: President! We wish to strongly object to your agreement to allow these misogynist views within the Federation, our union stands for equality for all and your decision makes a mockery of all that we stand for the females in our culture have not fought for their rights for centuries to stand alongside an empire that treats them in such a way.
STH_federation_flavour.125.name: Formal Objection from [STH_federation_flavour_120_country.GetName]
STH_federation_flavour.126.a: Send a diplomatic team to discuss.
STH_federation_flavour.126.desc: President [Root.GetRulerName] we must formally object to the Federation's continued discussions with [From.GetName], their misandric views are an affront to what many within the [Root.GetName] believe in!
STH_federation_flavour.126.name: Member State Objections
STH_federation_flavour.127.desc: President [Root.GetRulerName] we must formally object to the Federation's continued discussions with [From.GetName], their views and treatment of the female gender are an affront to what many within the [Root.GetName] believe in!
STH_federation_flavour.127.name: Member State Objections
STH_federation_flavour.128.desc: President [Root.GetRulerName] we simply cannot believe you are allowing [From.GetName] to join the Federation, allowing these criminal lowlife into the UFP is a security risk and a danger to our citizens, we formally object and demand this is discussed further.
STH_federation_flavour.128.name: Member State Objections
STH_federation_flavour.129.desc: Thanks to the efforts of [diplomacy_leader.GetName] our talks have been successful and harmony has again been restored to the member worlds of [Root.GetName] and a trust that the diplomatic service knows what is is doing.
STH_federation_flavour.129.name: Talks Successful
STH_federation_flavour.130.desc: Despite the efforts of [diplomacy_leader.GetName] our talks to bring harmony to the member worlds of [Root.GetName] has failed, as multiple Ambassadors formally announce their frustration at our latest new addition.
STH_federation_flavour.130.name: Talks Fail
STH_federation_flavour.131.a.tooltip: Agree to fund education programs and fund police activities to root out the crime syndicates.
STH_federation_flavour.131.desc: Hello, [accessionStateLeader.GetName] we have had disturbing reports about the criminal underworld and activity that makes up much of your society, the [Root.GetName] has established a community free from violence and crime that plagues your empire. \n\nIn order to progress your membership you must rid yourselves of these criminal elements and we will help you.
STH_federation_flavour.131.name: Criminal Underworld Concerns
STH_federation_flavour.132.desc_01: The Federation have agreed to fund programs, education initiates and policing projects to clear the criminal elements from our society, if we agree to support.
STH_federation_flavour.132.desc_02: The Federation has demanded that we agree to remove the criminal organizations from our empire in exchange for continued talks to join the Federation.
STH_federation_flavour.132.name: Criminal Underworld Concerns
STH_federation_flavour.133.desc: [temp_target.GetName] has agreed to work with [Root.GetName] authorities to tackle the criminal underworld and root out the criminal organanisations that are rife across this empire.
STH_federation_flavour.133.name: [temp_target.GetName] agrees to remove crime
STH_federation_flavour.134.desc: [temp_target.GetName] has requested a hefty amount of Latinum to rid their empire of the criminal syndicates, whilst many diplomats see this as a clear attempt at bribery, it would allow the talks to continue and achieve our goals of tackling the criminal problem.
STH_federation_flavour.134.name: Bribe Requested
STH_federation_flavour.135.desc: [temp_target.GetName] has refused to remove the criminal elements of their society and have ended their ongoing efforts to join us a a Member World.
STH_federation_flavour.135.name: [temp_target.GetName] refuse to change
STH_federation_flavour.136.desc: Attention President [Root.GetRulerName] we formally object to your clear bias and foolish tactics in allowing these undesirable traits into the harmony that is the [Root.GetName], this clear failure in leadership has not gone unnoticed.
STH_federation_flavour.136.name: Message from Member World
STH_federation_flavour.137.desc: Hello, [accessionStateLeader.GetName] we have had disturbing reports that you enslave your population and curtail the freedoms of your people, this is a practice that cannot be allowed within [Root.GetName] and must stop for you to continue this journey.
STH_federation_flavour.137.name: Slaving Concerns
STH_federation_flavour.138.desc_01: The Federation has agreed to fund programs, education initiates, and policing projects to eliminate the use of slaves throughout our empire.
STH_federation_flavour.138.desc_02: The Federation has demanded that we abandon our slavery culture before we can resume our bid to join their Federation.
STH_federation_flavour.138.name: Slaving Concerns
STH_federation_flavour.140.desc: [temp_target.GetName] have told us that they will not change and abandon their slaving ways, as a result, they have abandoned their attempt to join us as a Member World.
STH_federation_flavour.140.name: [temp_target.GetName] refuses to change
STH_federation_flavour.144.desc: As part of the integration process into the Federation, there is an opportunity for many of the leaders who have served [From.GetName] to request a transfer to Starfleet once [From.GetName] has completed the membership process.
STH_federation_flavour.144.name: Transfer Leaders to Starfleet
STH_federation_flavour.145.desc: As part of the transfer of fleet control to Starfleet, our Starbase will be transitioned to Starfleet control, except the Starbase belonging to our Capital. If we wish to control all Starbases it can be agreed here.
STH_federation_flavour.145.name: Starbase Control
STH_federation_flavour.147.a.tooltip: This country has failed to join the Federation and can re-apply n 20 years.
STH_federation_flavour.147.desc: Joining the Federation is not for every state, and on this occasion, the differences between the two sides were too great for the diplomats to overcome, and both parties agreed to leave the talks, with the option of re-attempting open in the future.
STH_federation_flavour.147.name: Federation Membership Process Abandoned
STH_federation_flavour.149.a: This is no concern of yours [cardassian_union_temp_leader.GetName].
STH_federation_flavour.149.b: Perhaps we need to slow down and investigate these claims.
STH_federation_flavour.149.desc: Greetings from across the border from your neighbours in the Cardassian Union, it has come to our attention that you are looking to welcome the Bajorans into your empire, let this be a friendly warning, the Bajorans cannot be trusted and from our experience are little more than petty terrorists, we would be more than willing to help you put them in their place should the need arise.
STH_federation_flavour.149.name: Message from Cardassia Prime
STH_federation_flavour.2.b: Tell me more about the earrings.
STH_federation_flavour.2.desc: Greetings child, I am Kai [bajoranKai.GetName]. Thank you for allowing me to voice my concerns on this matter.\n\nThe family earrings my people wear are a key facet of the expression of their faith in the Prophets.
STH_federation_flavour.2.name: Incoming Transmission From Kai [bajoranKai.GetName]
STH_federation_flavour.3.a: It is a shame it has ended this way.
STH_federation_flavour.3.desc_01: [Root.GetLeaderName], after much deliberation with the Vedek Council, the Kai, and the Ministers we have decided that membership is not in our best interests, while our religious beliefs may not be of much importance to you, we have given up so much of our heritage that this is a step too far. Maybe we can look at this union again, at a later date.
STH_federation_flavour.3.desc_02: Oh my child, I am sure you meant no disrespect when you turned down our request, but I am sure 'even' you can understand how we Bajorans can no longer continue this game of membership with an organisation that holds us in such contempt... perhaps a more enlighted culture would welcome us and deserve the love the Prophets, and their Kai have to offer.
STH_federation_flavour.3.name: Bajor Backs out of Federation Membership
STH_federation_flavour.4.a: Agree to discuss with the Chancellor.
STH_federation_flavour.4.desc: Our diplomats engaged in bringing the Klingon Empire into the [Root.GetName] has encountered a recurring issue that is circling with little progress. \n\nThe Klingon warriors are very proud of their Great House system and demonstrate their allegiances on their uniforms, this runs counter to our uniform policy, however the issue has reached the point it now requires direct management.
STH_federation_flavour.4.name: Klingon House Markings
STH_federation_flavour.5.desc: It is an honour to meet you [Root.GetRulerTitle] [Root.GetRulerName], I am [klingonLeader.GetName]. I can see that you are a notable warrior willing to discuss this topic with me, many would not... Our warriors are wary of giving up the Klingon way of life and submitting to the Federation, and whilst we can see the benefits of a stronger future together, I need something to take back to the uncertain elements within the Empire who fear the loss of our culture.
STH_federation_flavour.5.name: Meeting with the Chancellor
STH_federation_flavour.500.b: Now is not the time for this competition.
STH_federation_flavour.500.desc:
[Root.Owner.GetCaptainTitle] [Root.Leader.GetName] has risen rapidly in the fleet Anbo-jytsu championship league tables, and now prepares to face the current champion [anboJytsuChampion.GetName]. 

Anbo-jytsu, regarded by many as the ultimate form of [Root.Leader.Species.GetName] martial arts, is at the same time seen by some as a foolishly dangerous pastime. 

Taking place in a circular arena where two opponents compete against each other, both competitors wear light protective armor and a helmet which effectively blinds the participants. A staff is used as a weapon, with a proximity sensor on one end and a small spherical cushion on the other.
STH_federation_flavour.500.name: Anbo-jytsu
STH_federation_flavour.501.desc: After an intense bout, [Root.Owner.GetCaptainTitle] [Root.Leader.GetName] has defeated [From.GetName] to become the fleet Anbo-jytsu champion. \n\nWhile it appeared that [From.GetName] would press [From.GetHerHis] advantage to an easy victory several times in the match, it was [Root.Leader.GetName]'s persistence that eventually won the championship for [Root.Leader.GetHerHim].
STH_federation_flavour.501.name: Anbo-jytsu
STH_federation_flavour.502.desc:
After an intense bout, [Root.Owner.GetCaptainTitle] [Root.Leader.GetName] has been defeated by [From.GetName], who retains [From.GetHerHis] title as fleet Anbo-jytsu champion. 

While it appeared that [Root.Leader.GetName] had a number of opportunities to best [From.GetHerHis], it was [From.GetName]'s experience that eventually won the championship for [From.GetHerHim]. 

Worse, [Root.Leader.GetName] appears to have aggravated a previous injury resulting in reduced motor function in [Root.Leader.GetHerHis] left arm.
STH_federation_flavour.502.name: Anbo-jytsu
STH_federation_flavour.6.desc: [Root.GetRulerTitle] [Root.GetRulerName] I come from a proud race, a fierce race, and your refusal to allow us a small token of our culture is seen as too big an insult for many of our warriors to stand. The Klingon way is proud and spirited and your position demonstrated there is too big a gap between us for the Empire to join your alliance of Planets. Maybe we can resume the talk at a later date, but not today. Qapla'.
STH_federation_flavour.6.name: The Klingons back out of Federation Membership
STH_federation_flavour.602.desc:
After a long time in the depths of space, [Root.Owner.GetCaptainTitle] [Root.GetLeaderName] has begun to find it hard to recall [Root.Leader.GetHerHis] original purpose. The lives of the crew of [Root.GetFleetName] have become rote and routine. 

Others might aim for this model of efficiency, but for Starfleet, the morale and well-being of a crew are paramount. 

[Root.Owner.GetCaptainTitle] [Root.GetLeaderName] has started to consider organising crew activities to provide a break from the mundane.
STH_federation_flavour.602.name: Shipboard Activities
STH_federation_flavour.604.desc:
It has not taken long to organise a makeshift orchestra out of the crew of [Root.GetFleetName], as a surprising number of the crew have at least some experience with a musical instrument. 

After a month of preparation the crew has created something remarkable. While performances might lack some technical sophistication, they are instilled with a passion reserved only to those that have seen the depths of space. 

More importantly than that, the crew has bonded more strongly than ever before.
STH_federation_flavour.604.name: Shipboard Activities
STH_federation_flavour.605.desc:
'You're starting to sound angry again. Maybe you need another treatment.' 

'What I need is to get out of this cell. I've been locked in here for days. You've controlled my every move. You've told me what to eat, and what to think, and what to say, and then when I show a glimmer of independent thought, you strap me down! You inject me with drugs. You call it a treatment!' 

The organisation of an amateur dramatics group aboard the [Root.GetFleetName] has proven a welcome distraction for the crew.
STH_federation_flavour.605.name: Shipboard Activities
STH_federation_flavour.606.desc:
The holodeck provides a wide range of experiences, but it takes a unique talent to create rather than consume its output. 

Bored crew members enthused by ancient stories from their homeworlds have taken it upon themselves to do just that. 

The result well received, ultimately involving almost every member of the crew of [Root.GetFleetName] including [Root.Owner.GetCaptainTitle] [Root.GetLeaderName]. 

The show has since been recorded and distributed across the fleet.
STH_federation_flavour.606.name: Shipboard Activities
STH_federation_flavour.607.desc:
It has not taken long to organise a makeshift orchestra out of the crew of [Root.GetFleetName], as a surprising number of the crew have at least some experience with a musical instrument. 

After a month of preparation the crew has created something remarkable. While performances might lack some technical sophistication, they are instilled with a passion reserved only to those that have seen the depths of space. 

More importantly than that, the crew has bonded more strongly than ever before.
STH_federation_flavour.607.name: Shipboard Activities
STH_federation_flavour.608.desc: Blending theatre, literature and sculpture together with storytelling techniques hailing back to the days of ancient electronic games, crafting an interactive holo-novel is an art form like no other. \n\nWorking together, the crew of the [Root.GetFleetName] have created something unique - weaving a story that is based in part on their own adventures and discoveries, and in part on the output of their collectively wide ranging imaginations, allowing everyone to create their own interstellar adventure.
STH_federation_flavour.608.name: Shipboard Activities
STH_federation_flavour.609.desc:
The crew of the [Root.GetFleetName] quickly approved of the idea of engaging in a bout of friendly competition. 

One crew member dug deeply into the archives and found an ancient Earth card game that seemed suitable - poker. Arranging a complex system that would let every officer participate in several bouts before finding their ranking and competing against their peers, the crew spent the entire month in fierce preparation and fiercer elimination bouts. 

The final winner received a crate of Saurian Brandy, but vowed to share it with the crew at the nearest opportunity.
STH_federation_flavour.609.name: Shipboard Activities
STH_federation_flavour.610.desc:
Always practical, the crew of the [Root.GetFleetName] took the news of their downtime with equimony and set up a strict regime of training. 

To make it more engaging and to fit with the [Root.Owner.GetCaptainTitle]'s order to relax, the crew has decided to make the fire-range training exercise into a competition. 

The winner, a recent transfer to security, received a crate of Saurian Brandy which was quickly shared among the department.
STH_federation_flavour.610.name: Shipboard Activities
STH_federation_flavour.620.desc: The officers of the [Root.GetFleetName] have declared today to be [Root.Owner.GetCaptainTitle] [Root.Leader.GetName] Day. \n\nOrnaments, a plethora of confections and drinks from the [Root.Owner.GetCaptainTitle]'s home city and an assortment of colorful banners have all been planned.
STH_federation_flavour.620.name: Shipboard Activities
STH_federation_flavour.621.b: It is time for this tradition to come to an end.
STH_federation_flavour.621.desc: Following the success of the previous [Root.Owner.GetCaptainTitle] [Root.Leader.GetName] Day celebration, the crew of the [Root.GetFleetName] have decided to continue the tradition into this year once again.
STH_federation_flavour.621.name: Shipboard Activities
STH_federation_flavour.630.desc.intraCre:
The officers of the [Root.GetFleetName] have decided to hold a baseball tournament among the crew on the ship's holodeck.

An old Earth game, many consider it obscure enough to ensure all participants go into the game as novices.

Splitting the crew into department-level teams, the winning side is promised a month's worth of holodeck priority.
STH_federation_flavour.630.desc.planet:
The officers of the [Root.GetFleetName] have decided to hold a baseball tournament among the crew on the ship's holodeck.

An old Earth game, many consider it obscure enough to ensure all participants go into the game as novices.

Organising the crew into a single team, the nearby world of [baseballCompetitorPlanet.GetName] has been challenged to assemble a team and join the competition, with the winning side promised several crates of Saurian Brandy.
STH_federation_flavour.630.desc.ship:
The officers of the [Root.GetFleetName] have decided to hold a baseball tournament among the crew on the ship's holodeck.

An old Earth game, many consider it obscure enough to ensure all participants go into the game as novices.

Organising the crew into a single team, the nearby [baseballCompetitorShip.GetName] has been challenged to assemble a team and join the competition, with the winning side promised several crates of Saurian Brandy.
STH_federation_flavour.630.name: Shipboard Activities
STH_federation_flavour.631.desc.intraCre: The [Root.GetFleetName]'s Science department has defeated the other ship's teams in a closely fought baseball tournament.\n\nProud of their achievement, the crew have considered organising to play more frequently in future.
STH_federation_flavour.631.desc.planet: The [Root.GetFleetName] has defeated the [baseballCompetitorPlanet.GetName] team in a closely fought baseball tournament.\n\nProud of their achievement, the crew have considered organising the team to play more frequently in future.
STH_federation_flavour.631.desc.ship: The [Root.GetFleetName] has defeated the [baseballCompetitorShip.GetName] team in a closely fought baseball tournament.\n\nProud of their achievement, the crew have considered organising the team to play more frequently in future.
STH_federation_flavour.631.name: Shipboard Activities
STH_federation_flavour.632.desc.intraCre: While the [Root.GetFleetName]'s Tactical department has defeated the other ship's teams, few among the crew seemed to find the game an enjoyable experience.
STH_federation_flavour.632.desc.planet: The [Root.GetFleetName] has been defeated by the [baseballCompetitorPlanet.GetName] team in a closely fought baseball tournament.\n\nDespite the loss, the crew have considered organising the team to play more frequently in future.
STH_federation_flavour.632.desc.ship: The [Root.GetFleetName] has been defeated by the [baseballCompetitorShip.GetName] team in a closely fought baseball tournament.\n\nDespite the loss, the crew have considered organising the team to play more frequently in future.
STH_federation_flavour.632.name: Shipboard Activities
STH_federation_flavour.7.a: Agree to meet with the Nagus.
STH_federation_flavour.700.desc: The transportation of large amounts of material and personnel to Luna in order to repair the damage done to the Orpheus Mining Colony is complete, and the mobile drilling platform is operational once again.
STH_federation_flavour.700.name: Orpheus Mining Colony
STH_federation_flavour.701.desc: The small settlement of Armstrong City on the moon has been expanded greatly with new buildings and colonists. Colonists continue to flock to the new opportunities on Luna, with one quoted as saying this of the month long Lunar night. \n\n'People say it's so barren and harsh, but it's not. it's beautiful. Dawn is so shocking on the moon. One minute you're in the darkest night you can imagine, and the next instant, the sun lifts up and this glorious, pure light just explodes across the surface.'
STH_federation_flavour.701.name: Armstrong City
STH_federation_flavour.702.desc: The small settlement of Tycho City on the moon has been expanded greatly with new buildings and colonists. The lunar population is now thriving, and within a few years the city will be one of several lunar landmarks large enough to be seen from Earth in the daytime.
STH_federation_flavour.702.name: Tycho City
STH_federation_flavour.703.desc: The upgraded Academy complex in San Francisco will be the pinciple of education across the Federation, training young officers and imparting the knowledge and skills for future captains for generations to come.
STH_federation_flavour.703.name: Starfleet Academy
STH_federation_flavour.704.desc: The small settlement of New Berlin on the moon has been expanded greatly with new buildings and colonists. The lunar population is now thriving, and within a few years the city will be one of several lunar landmarks large enough to be seen from Earth in the daytime.
STH_federation_flavour.704.name: New Berlin City
STH_federation_flavour.705.desc: The Omega training mission exercise on Titan was rapidly becoming a notorious training scenario for Starfleet recruits, the expansion of this facility to a state of the art survival training centre creates a tougher breed of officer entering Starfleet.
STH_federation_flavour.705.name: Titan Training Facility
STH_federation_flavour.706.desc: The Daystrom Institute, also known as the Daystrom Institute of Advanced Robotics, Daystrom Research Institute, Daystrom Institute of Technology, and Daystrom Technological Institute, is a Federation establishment based in Okinawa, Japan. It is considered a department within Starfleet. The Institute is named after Doctor Richard Daystrom, who invented the duotronic computer and unsuccessfully attempted to create the first multitronic computer. The institute employs both Starfleet personnel and civilians who are scientific and research specialists in their fields of study.
STH_federation_flavour.706.name: The Daystrom Institute
STH_federation_flavour.750.desc: The Atlantis Project, the creation of a new artificial sub-continent out of the Mid-Atlantic Ridge, has long been a dream of Director [atlantis_manager.GetName].
