K'Ratak's epic novel 'qul naj' has inspired billions across the [Root.GetName]. The story describes a young warrior's pilgrimage to the fire mountains, with the text praised for its elegance and harsh beauty.
STH_klingon_flavour.100.name: 'qul naj'
STH_klingon_flavour.11.desc_01:
The songwright Be'BaH, a close friend of the [Root.GetRulerTitle], secured the commission to score the epic celebration of [officer.GetName]'s victories. 

Demanding the first performance be in the Grand Opera Chambers on [Root.Capital.GetName] with the entire Council in attendance, few expected much from the performance. 

The scepticism was well founded, as most in attendance found the work to be an inferior derivative of a number of turn-of-the-millennium classics.
STH_klingon_flavour.11.name: Deeds Worthy of Song
STH_klingon_flavour.2.desc: Captain [Root.GetLeaderName] draws a Mek'leth and charges at [challengingOfficer.GetName], who deflects the blow with savage strength. Slash after slash connects Mek'leth to Mek'leth and the bridge is lit with the sparks from each clash. \n\nThe Captain feigns left and sweeps the feet out from under [officer.GetHerHis] opponent. Falling backward, the [challengingOfficer.GetName]'s skull impacts the edge of the tactical console and the crack of shattering bone is heard. Blood pools around the base of the console as the bridge crew chant '[Root.GetLeaderName]! [Root.GetLeaderName]!'.
STH_klingon_flavour.2.name: Leadership Challenge
STH_klingon_flavour.3.desc:
Captain [Root.GetLeaderName] draws a Mek'leth and charges at [challengingOfficer.GetName], who deflects the blow with savage strength. Slash after slash connects Mek'leth to Mek'leth and the bridge is lit with the sparks from each clash. 

[challengingOfficer.GetName] lunges at the Captain and powering through the parry, embeds a blade into the arm of the Captain, who kicks [challengingOfficer.GetHerHim] back. 

The Captain, wounded, feigns left and sweeps the feet out from under the returning opponent. Falling backward, the [challengingOfficer.GetName]'s skull impacts the edge of the tactical console and the crack of shattering bone is heard. Blood pools around the base of the console as the bridge crew chant '[Root.GetLeaderName]! [Root.GetLeaderName]!'.
STH_klingon_flavour.3.name: Leadership Challenge
STH_klingon_flavour.4.desc: Captain [Root.GetLeaderName] draws a disruptor pistol and an instant later [challengingOfficer.GetName]'s tortured writhing form is vaporised in a cascade of disintegrating molecules. The bridge crew stand in silence until, at last, the Captain orders them to their stations, a fanged grin forming on [officer.GetHerHis] face.
STH_klingon_flavour.4.name: Leadership Challenge
STH_klingon_flavour.5.desc:
Captain [Root.GetLeaderName] draws a Mek'leth and charges at [challengingOfficer.GetName], who deflects the blow with savage strength. Slash after slash connects Mek'leth to Mek'leth and the bridge is lit with the sparks from each clash. 

[challengingOfficer.GetName] lunges at the Captain and powering through the parry embeds a blade into [officer.GetHerHis] arm. [officer.GetName] kicks [challengingOfficer.GetName] back. 

The Captain, wounded, attempts to feign left and sweeps the feet out from under the returning opponent but [challengingOfficer.GetSheHe]'s too slow and is caught off guard. Falling backward, the Captain's skull impacts the edge of the tactical console and the crack of shattering bone is heard. Blood pools around the base of the console as the bridge crew chant '[challengingOfficer.GetName]! [challengingOfficer.GetName]!'.
STH_klingon_flavour.5.name: Leadership Challenge
STH_klingon_flavour.6.desc:
The representatives of the Imperial Mining Guild gather in the Great Hall, waiting for [Root.GetRulerTitle] [Root.GetRulerName] to enter. They exchange excited whispers until at last the Imperial herald announces the [Root.GetRulerTitle]'s arrival. 

'Your guild requested this hearing with great urgency,' [Root.GetRulerName] says to the group. 'Tell me what is so important.' 

The guildsmen look to the leader of their delegation, an ancient white haired Klingon with arms thick from years of labour. 

'We believe we may have found an opportunity to bolster our war capacity. Praxis has vast, untapped mineral and energy potential. Our proposal is here on this datapad, but we think you'll agree that this can give the Empire a clear advantage.' 

[Root.GetRulerName] takes the datapad and begins to read.
STH_klingon_flavour.6.name: Praxis Mining Operations
STH_klingon_flavour.7.desc:
Disaster! 

Praxis has exploded. Years of overmining had left the moon's core unstable until at last an accident in an industrial fusion reactor caused a cascade reaction, destroying all facilities on the surface. 

Praxis is broken, and debris rains down on Qo'nos. The damage from this cataclysm could take generations to undo...
STH_klingon_flavour.7.name: Praxis Mining Operations
STH_klingon_flavour.8.b: Now is not the time for song.
STH_klingon_flavour.8.desc: Having defeated the [From.GetName] bIHnuch in glorious battle, Captain [officer.GetName] has earned [officer.GetHerHim]self the respect of many in the [This.GetName]. \n\nSongwrights across [This.Capital.GetName] compete for the honour of putting [officer.GetName]'s deeds to song.
STH_klingon_flavour.8.name: Deeds Worthy of Song
STH_klingon_flavour.9.desc_01:
The renowned songwrights L'narD and CoH'n put aside their bitter house rivalries to collaborate on their epic celebration of [officer.GetName]'s victories. 

The [Root.GetRulerTitle] [ruler.GetHerHim]self demanded the first performance be in the Grand Opera Chambers on [Root.Capital.GetName], with the entire Council in attendance. 

The performance was widely judged to have been both L'narD and CoH'n's best work yet, and the recording of the three hour epic has found a place in almost every House on [Root.Capital.GetName].
STH_klingon_flavour.9.name: Deeds Worthy of Song
STH_klingon_houses.300.a: Rule [klingon_house_target_planet.GetName] on behalf of the Empire.
STH_klingon_houses.300.b: These planets remain with the Empire.
STH_klingon_houses.300.c: There are no suitable worlds to govern right now.
STH_klingon_houses.300.desc.disloyal: The [new_klingon_great_house.GetName] stands before you [Root.GetRulerTitle] [Root.GetRulerName] ready to demonstrate what real leadership looks like, grant us a world within the Empire and we shall make it prosper, failure to do so will only further heighten our distaste for your leadership.
STH_klingon_houses.300.desc.loyal: My Chancellor, [new_klingon_great_house.GetName] stands ready to support the Empire. Give us the opportunity to rule a world on behalf of the Empire, we shall rule with honour and bring glory to the Empire and [new_klingon_great_house.GetName].
STH_klingon_houses.300.desc.same_house: Chancellor, whilst you lead our mighty Empire, [new_klingon_great_house.GetName] grows strong and powerful, let us rule one of the worlds within the Empire and make it prosper in your name.
STH_klingon_houses.300.name: High Stewardship within the Empire
STH_klingon_houses.3010.a: We shall negotiate a suitable outcome.
STH_klingon_houses.3010.c: You will let this matter end now.
STH_klingon_houses.3010.desc_01: My Chancellor, I come before you representing [great_house_defender.GetName], our house was dishonoured by those foul rogues of [great_house_accuser.GetName] ! During a visit to our noble lands one of their warriors attacked one of our prize hunting Targs causing the beast some distress. \n\nWe ask that you handle the matter.
STH_klingon_houses.3010.desc_02: My Chancellor, I come before you representing [great_house_defender.GetName], our house was dishonoured by those foul petaQ of [great_house_accuser.GetName] ! Their inability to control the warriors under their control resulted in a brawl which caused considerable damage to our property. \n\nWe demand justice for our house.
STH_klingon_houses.3010.desc_03: My Chancellor, I come before you representing [great_house_defender.GetName], our house honur has been besmirched by [great_house_accuser.GetName] ! Whilst in our presence they insulted our beloved house matriarch, referring to her as 'looking like the behind of a Targ'. \n\nThey are lucky we did not slay them on the spot, instead we seek the council's judgement.
STH_klingon_houses.3010.name: Klingon House Politics
STH_klingon_houses.3011.desc: The conflict between the feuding Great Houses has been resolved amicably, whilst a warrior never relishes the role of peacemaker... sometimes the hourable actions is to put the good of the Empire above personal glory.
STH_klingon_houses.3011.name: House Conflict Resolved
STH_klingon_houses.3012.desc: Our efforts to bring peace to the quarreling Houses has unfortunately not been successful. Both parties remain at odds with one another, a position that ultimately weakens the Empire as this will likely evolve into a full-blown feud between the Houses.
STH_klingon_houses.3012.name: House Conflict Remains
STH_klingon_houses.3015.a: Real warriors settle such feuds with bloodwine.
STH_klingon_houses.3015.d: This is not worthy of our time.
STH_klingon_houses.3015.desc_01: Honorable Chancellor [Root.GetRulerName], my House, the noble [great_house_defender.GetName] stands falsely accused of behaving with complete dishonour whilst attending a gathering hosted by [great_house_accuser.GetName]. They accuse one of our second sons of getting drunk and in an inebriated state causing a fire and significant property damage. \n\nThis blatant falsehood cannot go un-answered.
STH_klingon_houses.3015.desc_02: Honorable Chancellor [Root.GetRulerName], my House, the noble [great_house_defender.GetName] stands falsely accused of behaving with complete dishonour whilst attending a gathering hosted by [great_house_accuser.GetName]. They accuse one of our cousins of insulting one of their children's honour. \n\nWhilst this Klingon is no beauty, they are not worthy of our contempt.
STH_klingon_houses.3015.name: Klingon House Politics
STH_klingon_houses.3016.a: We shall attempt a discussion with both sides.
STH_klingon_houses.3016.desc_01: Honorable Chancellor [Root.GetRulerName], my House, the noble [great_house_accuser.GetName] accuses the foul [great_house_defender.GetName] of causing us insult, during the last banquet in the Great Hall of Kahless one of their warriors was overheard by many Nobles referring to our great and noble house as weak and pathetic. Had we heard this insult at the time the fool would no longer be breathing, however we demand our honour satisfied.
STH_klingon_houses.3016.desc_02: Honorable Chancellor [Root.GetRulerName], my House, the honourable [great_house_accuser.GetName] wishes to make you aware that [great_house_defender.GetName] stands accused of stealing from us. We caught one of their servants stealing from our weapons store. That servant no longer lives to tell the tale of their foolishness, but their house must pay.
STH_klingon_houses.3016.desc_03: My Lord it was agreed under sworn oath that [great_house_defender.GetName] would stand by us in a battle against pirates attacking our trading lanes. However, they left my House [great_house_accuser.GetName] to tackle these pirates without the aid of their fleets. My Lord [great_house_accuser.GetName] was victorious in glorious combat, but we wish revenge on these cowards.
STH_klingon_houses.3016.desc_04: Lord Chancellor, it is with deep regret that I must report a daughter of [great_house_accuser.GetName] has married a miserable petaQ son of [great_house_defender.GetName], this union was carried out without our blessing and whilst a Klingon woman may marry as she pleases, our daughter would surely not act in such a manner, unless some foul trickery was in play.
STH_klingon_houses.3020.a: This will be settled via combat.
STH_klingon_houses.3020.desc_01: [Root.GetRulerTitle] [Root.GetRulerName] I [great_house_accuser.ruler] of [great_house_accuser.GetName] stand before the High Council today accusing the insulant [great_house_defender.GetName] of doing us a great insult during the last council session. Their false accusations against us have insulted our name and the honour of our house. We demand that justice is served.
STH_klingon_houses.3020.desc_02: [Root.GetRulerTitle] [Root.GetRulerName] I [great_house_accuser.ruler] of [great_house_accuser.GetName] stand before you all today accusing the fools in [great_house_defender.GetName] they have broken off the marriage ceremony from a member of their house to one of ours. Their claims that we are not worthy of uniting the houses deeply wounds us. \n\nWe ask the council for justice.
STH_klingon_houses.3020.name: Klingon House Politics
STH_klingon_houses.3021.b: A fine warrior gave their life today.
STH_klingon_houses.3021.desc_01: Following a fierce battle between the champions from both houses, the winner is announced as [great_house_accuser.GetName] emerges victorious from the fight. Their leader suffering life-changing wounds, but the clear victor. \n\nWith the win, this matter should be considered closed.
STH_klingon_houses.3021.desc_02: Following a fierce battle between the champions from both houses, the winner is announced as [great_house_accuser.GetName] emerges victorious from the fight. However this victory has come at a high cost with the death of the House champion.\n\nAs this was ritual combat any injury or death is to be embraced as the warriors have earnt their place in Sto-Vo-Kor, the Empire considers this matter finished.
STH_klingon_houses.3021.desc_03: Following a fierce battle between the champions from both houses, the winner is announced as [great_house_accuser.GetName] emerges victorious from the fight. Both champions emerge bloody and full of the glory of battle. [great_house_accuser.GetName] champion walks away from the battle as the victor for both their personal honour and that of their house.
STH_klingon_houses.3021.desc_04: Following a fierce battle between the champions from both houses, the winner is announced as [great_house_accuser.GetName] his opponent lying dead on the floor, felled by a swing of a mighty Bat'leth. There can be no finer death for a Klingon warrior than one in combat.
STH_klingon_houses.3021.name: Ritual Combat
STH_klingon_houses.3022.b: A fine warrior gave their life today.
STH_klingon_houses.3022.desc_01: Following a fierce battle between the champions from both houses, the winner is announced as [great_house_defender.GetName] emerges victorious from the fight. Their leader suffering life-changing wounds, but the clear victor. \n\nWith the win, this matter should be considered closed.
STH_klingon_houses.3022.desc_02: Following a fierce battle between the champions from both houses, the winner is announced as [great_house_defender.GetName] emerges victorious from the fight. However this victory has come at a high cost with the death of the House champion, \n\nAs this was ritual combat any injury or death is to be embraced as the warriors have earnt their place in Sto-Vo-Kor, the Empire considers this matter finished.
STH_klingon_houses.3022.desc_03: Following a fierce battle between the champions from both houses, the winner is announced as [great_house_defender.GetName] emerges victorious from the fight. Both champions emerge bloody and full of the glory of battle. [great_house_defender.GetName] champion walks away from the battle as the victor for both their personal honour and that of their house.
STH_klingon_houses.3022.desc_04: Following a fierce battle between the champions from both houses, the winner is announced as [great_house_defender.GetName] his opponent lying dead on the floor, felled by a swing of a mighty Bat'leth. There can be no finer death for a Klingon warrior than one in combat.
STH_klingon_houses.3022.name: Ritual Combat
STH_klingon_houses.3023.desc: Following fierce combat, with both warriors giving their all there was no clear winner in the battle between both Houses. As such the Empire rules that neither House can stand victorious and the matter between both Houses should be considered resolved. Victory can only go to the victor!
STH_klingon_houses.3023.name: Combat ends in statemate
STH_klingon_houses.3025.a: You are correct and shall rule this planet.
STH_klingon_houses.3025.c: Perhaps they should give you something else.
STH_klingon_houses.3025.desc: For too long [great_house_defender.GetName] have held on to planet [accuser_target_planet.GetName] a world that should be ours by rights. They have squandered the opportunity they have been given and wasted the potential of the world for the Empire. \n\nYou must act now and transfer governorship of this world over to our House.
STH_klingon_houses.3025.name: Klingon House Politics
STH_klingon_houses.3026.b: Your warrior should have fought harder.
STH_klingon_houses.3026.c: The warrior will be executed for this act.
STH_klingon_houses.3026.desc: Chancellor, I come before this High Council to report the death of one of our House warriors in combat with another soldier from [great_house_defender.GetName]. The leadership of [great_house_accuser.GetName] consider this an act of murder and we demand that [great_house_defender.GetName] are suitably punished by the Empire.
STH_klingon_houses.3026.name: Klingon House Politics
STH_klingon_houses.3027.b: This matter should be solved in battle.
STH_klingon_houses.3027.c: Their House leader shall die for this dishonour!
STH_klingon_houses.3027.desc: My Chancellor, it is with great regret that [great_house_defender.GetName] must inform you that [great_house_accuser.GetName] harbours a murderer within their ranks. One of their cowards killed a member of our noble family whilst his back was turned and they were defenseless. This act is best suited to that of a Romulan and has no place being conducted by a Klingon. \n\nThis must not go unpunished and we demand justice.
STH_klingon_houses.3027.name: Klingon House Politics
STH_klingon_houses.3030.a: We raise a glass to the couple!
STH_klingon_houses.3030.desc: My Chancellor, it is with great joy that we announce that a son of the [great_house_defender.GetName] and a daughter of the [great_house_accuser.GetName] have wed in a glorious ceremony worthy of Kahless and the Lady Lukara. \n\nWe hope this is the start of a new era of harmony between the houses.
STH_klingon_houses.3030.name: Klingon House Politics
STH_klingon_houses.3031.desc: Chancellor, we must report an act of honour from one of your Great Houses, one of our transports was attacked by pirates, and whilst they fought like true Klingons worthy of [great_house_defender.GetName] they would have been defeated had they not been saved by honourable warriors from [great_house_accuser.GetName]. \n\nAn act of honour which goes some way to building a better relationship between our houses.
STH_klingon_houses.3031.name: Klingon House Politics
STH_klingon_houses.3032.desc: Chancellor, we must report an act of bravery from one of your Great Houses, an act which will go down in story.. Our flagship suffered a critical warp core breach whilst on patrol, a crew from [great_house_accuser.GetName] risked their lives to save our family leadership. \n\nThis act has strengthened the bond between [great_house_accuser.GetName] and [great_house_defender.GetName].
STH_klingon_houses.3032.name: Klingon House Politics
STH_klingon_houses.351.desc: A new system has been claimed for the Empire by one of our Great Houses, as is our right we have claimed the planet for the High Council. Starbase [greatHouseStarbase.GetName] now belongs to us.
STH_klingon_houses.351.name: New World Claimed for the Empire
STH_klingon_houses.370.a: This world belongs to the Empire.
STH_klingon_houses.370.desc:
A new world has been colonised for the Empire and now the Great Houses crowd around us, braying for the rights to become overlords of our new world and govern it on behalf of the Empire. 

Selecting one of the Great Houses to take ownership of the new world will allow the Great House to grow in power and loyalty, whilst causing the other Houses to resent the choice we made. 

We should pick carefully.
STH_klingon_houses.370.name: A new world for the Empire
STH_klingon_houses.381.desc: The dishonourable petaQ of [rogue_klingon_house.GetName] have betrayed the Empire and declared themselves a rogue faction. This act of dishonour just as the Empire goes to war will not be tolerated.
STH_klingon_houses.381.name: [rogue_klingon_house.GetName] has betrayed the Empire
STH_klingon_mechanics.100.name: The [Root.GetName]
STH_klingon_mechanics.1010.desc:
Qapla', [Root.GetRulerTitle]. I am gin'tak'tIn [gin_tak_tIn.GetName], overseer of the day to day bureaucracy that would be beneath the attention of a great leader such as yourself. 

As you know, the High Council is comprised of the representatives of the most powerful houses and headed by yourself, the [Root.GetRulerTitle]. 

The Council is charged with overseeing the welfare of the [Root.GetName] and its citizens, meeting here in the Great Hall on [Root.Capital.GetName]. 

What matters do you wish addressed in this session of the High Council?
STH_klingon_mechanics.1010.name: Klingon High Council
STH_klingon_mechanics.1011.desc: The [Root.GetName] is not governed by tyrants, [Root.GetRulerTitle]. There is honour in allowing for an orderly succession from one house to another. \n\nIf you wish, you may nominate a successor should any command enough support.
STH_klingon_mechanics.1011.name: Klingon High Council
STH_klingon_mechanics.1012.desc: The [Root.GetName] is strengthened by our houses working together. You have my gratitude for naming me as your successor, [Root.GetRulerName].
STH_klingon_mechanics.1012.name: Klingon High Council
STH_klingon_mechanics.1020.desc: Many great warriors start and end their careers in the service of their house's militia rather than the Imperial fleet. \n\nIf properly compensated, these warriors would gladly earn honour for both their house and the [Root.GetName] itself.
STH_klingon_mechanics.1020.name: Klingon High Council
STH_klingon_mechanics.1021.desc.01: I am [houseLeader.GetName] of the [From.GetName]. Which of my warriors do you wish to honour with a commission in the Imperial Fleet?
STH_klingon_mechanics.1021.desc.02: Qapla', [Root.GetRulerTitle]. I am [houseLeader.GetName], gin'tak of your house. Which of your warriors do you wish to honour with a commission in the Imperial Fleet?
STH_klingon_mechanics.1021.name: Klingon High Council
STH_klingon_mechanics.1022.desc: Qapla', [Root.GetRulerTitle]. I am [FromFrom.GetName] of the [From.GetName] and I pledge my life in service of the [Root.GetName].
STH_klingon_mechanics.1022.name: [FromFrom.GetName]'s Commission
STH_klingon_mechanics.103.a.disable: Reclaim the Torch of G'boj relic.
STH_klingon_mechanics.103.a: Bestow the Torch of G'boj relic.
STH_klingon_mechanics.103.b.disable: Reclaim the Hand of Kull relic.
STH_klingon_mechanics.103.b: Bestow the Hand of Kull relic.
STH_klingon_mechanics.103.c.disable: Reclaim the Armour of Sabak relic.
STH_klingon_mechanics.103.c: Bestow the Armour of Sabak relic.
STH_klingon_mechanics.103.desc.disloyal: So you wish to honour the [Root.GetName]? Very well, what will it be?
STH_klingon_mechanics.103.desc.same_hous: $great_house_ruler$, this may not be wise. While I have no doubt that the [Root.GetName] deserves these honours, the other Great Houses may not be so willing to agree.
STH_klingon_mechanics.103.e.disable: Reclaim oversight of the Order of the Bat'leth.
STH_klingon_mechanics.103.e: Bestow oversight of the Order of the Bat'leth.
STH_klingon_mechanics.103.f.disable: Reclaim oversight of the Order of Basai.
STH_klingon_mechanics.103.f: Bestow oversight of the Order of Basai.
STH_klingon_mechanics.1030.desc: The Great Houses are known to feud with each other over matters of honour. In the normal course of events this is healthy, however there are times when it may be prudent to promote unity, especially if an outside threat looms. \n\nThe Houses below are currently engaged in such a feud.
STH_klingon_mechanics.1030.name: Klingon High Council
STH_klingon_mechanics.1031.desc: The [From.GetName] has currently declared feuds against the following Great Houses.
STH_klingon_mechanics.1031.name: Klingon High Council
STH_klingon_mechanics.1032.desc: There are a number of ways we may appeal to [fromFaction.Leader.GetName] of the [From.GetName] and [fromfromFaction.Leader.GetName] of the [FromFrom.GetName] to end their feud. \n\nInfluence and honours can be granted to both, or else resources can be promised. Alternatively, a public appeal to their duty to the [Root.GetName] may be enough.
STH_klingon_mechanics.1032.name: Klingon High Council
STH_klingon_mechanics.1033.desc: The [From.GetName] and [FromFrom.GetName] have been unable to negotiate an end to their feud, despite the intervention of the [Root.GetRulerTitle].
STH_klingon_mechanics.1033.name: Klingon High Council
STH_klingon_mechanics.1034.desc: The [From.GetName] and [FromFrom.GetName] have negotiated an end to their feud, following the intervention of the [Root.GetRulerTitle].
STH_klingon_mechanics.1034.name: Klingon High Council
STH_klingon_mechanics.104.desc.disloyal: You reveal your true intentions then? Ever the politician, [Root.Owner.Leader.GetName].
STH_klingon_mechanics.104.desc.loyal: This is surely joke? The [Root.GetName] has done nothing to warrant such... dishonour!
STH_klingon_mechanics.104.desc.same_hous: Very droll, $great_house_ruler$. I almost thought you were serious for a moment there.
STH_klingon_mechanics.104.name: Dispense Discommendation
STH_klingon_mechanics.1040.b: Withdraw resources for the Imperial Fleet.
STH_klingon_mechanics.1040.desc:
The strength of the [Root.GetName] is divided between the Imperial Fleet and the Great House's militias. 

While it may look advantageous to bring the resources of the Houses under the direct control of the High Council, it is often the case that each House can operate their own fleets more efficiently. 

As [Root.GetRulerTitle] you may contribute resources to the militias to construct and operate their own fleets. Alternatively, resources can be withdrawn and used to construct ships under the control of the Imperial Fleet. 

As you may expect, the Great Houses themselves will react accordingly depending on your choice...

Each level of contribution will increase the amount of vessels that the Houses are able to construct themselves for their militias, which in turn is based upon the amount of planets and systems they own themselves.
STH_klingon_mechanics.1040.name: Klingon High Council
STH_klingon_mechanics.1041.a.tooltip: Contribute a small amount of £ Minerals to the House in order to bolster future ship construction.
STH_klingon_mechanics.1041.b.tooltip: Contribute a moderate amount of £ Minerals to the House in order to bolster future ship construction.
STH_klingon_mechanics.1041.c.tooltip: Contribute a large amount of £ Minerals to the House in order to bolster future ship construction.
STH_klingon_mechanics.1041.desc: What size contribution do you wish to make to the militias?
STH_klingon_mechanics.1041.name: Klingon High Council
STH_klingon_mechanics.1042.desc: On what scale do you wish to seize control of the House's war material?
STH_klingon_mechanics.1042.name: Klingon High Council
STH_klingon_mechanics.105.desc: You've seen sense then? The [Root.GetName]'s honour and integrity should never have been questioned, but if you truly wish to restore our place, then let us move forward for the good of the [Root.Owner.GetName].
STH_klingon_mechanics.105.name: Restore House Honour
STH_klingon_mechanics.1050.desc: nuqneH my [Root.GetRulerTitle]! I am [house_leader.GetRulerName] of the [great_house_name.GetName]. What is it that the High Council wants from us?
STH_klingon_mechanics.120.desc: Following our attempt to seize control of a world that rightly belongs to us [factionCountryTemp.GetName] has acted with complete dishonour and rebelled against the Empire. All fleets, planets and individuals of [factionCountryTemp.GetName] should now be considered traitors.
STH_klingon_mechanics.120.name: [factionCountryTemp.GetName] has rebelled
STH_klingon_mechanics.1500.desc: The Klingon Empire has always been led by powerful houses, but every so often a new house reaches the level of greatness and worthy of a position at the top of Klingon society. The [great_house_target.GetName] has battled their way to the top and are ready to make their mark within the Klingon Empire.
STH_klingon_mechanics.1500.name: The Klingon Great Houses
STH_klingon_mechanics.1503.a: Dismantle the House of M'Rek HQ station.
STH_klingon_mechanics.1503.b: Restore the House of M'Rek HQ station.
STH_klingon_mechanics.1503.c: Dismantle the House of Mogh HQ station.
STH_klingon_mechanics.1503.d: Restore the House of Mogh HQ station.
STH_klingon_mechanics.1503.desc: A headquaters belonging to one of Empire's Great Houses has fallen into our possession. It's former owner was unable to keep hold of the property and the shipyard that comes with it. This building comes with a small overhead, we can either keep it or dismantle it for resources.
STH_klingon_mechanics.1503.e: Dismantle the House of Antaak HQ station.
STH_klingon_mechanics.1503.f: Restore the House of Antaak HQ station.
STH_klingon_mechanics.1503.g: Dismantle the House of Duras HQ station.
STH_klingon_mechanics.1503.h: Restore the House of Duras HQ station.
STH_klingon_mechanics.1503.i: Dismantle the House of Gowron HQ station.
STH_klingon_mechanics.1503.j: Restore the House of Gowron HQ station.
STH_klingon_mechanics.1503.k: Dismantle the House of Mo'Kai HQ station.
STH_klingon_mechanics.1503.l: Restore the House of Mo'Kai HQ station.
STH_klingon_mechanics.1503.m: Dismantle the House of Konjah HQ station.
STH_klingon_mechanics.1503.n: Restore the House of Konjah HQ station.
STH_klingon_mechanics.1503.name: Great House HQ in our Possession
STH_klingon_mechanics.1503.o: Dismantle the House of Koloth HQ station.
STH_klingon_mechanics.1503.p: Restore the House of Koloth HQ station.
STH_klingon_mechanics.1503.q: Dismantle the House of Kor HQ station.
STH_klingon_mechanics.1503.r: Restore the House of Kor HQ station.
STH_klingon_mechanics.1503.s: Dismantle the House of Kang HQ station.
STH_klingon_mechanics.1503.t: Restore the House of Kang HQ station.
STH_klingon_mechanics.1503.u: Dismantle the House of Martok HQ station.
STH_klingon_mechanics.1503.v: Restore the House of Martok HQ station.
STH_klingon_mechanics.1504.desc: Chancellor, our data from our Great Houses report that the following Houses do not currently own their own shipbuilding complex. This will severely limit their ability to support and defend the empire. \n\nWe should look to rectify this situation as soon as possible.
STH_klingon_mechanics.1504.name: Klingon High Council
STH_klingon_mechanics.1505.desc: The Noble Houses are powerful and wealthy familys, but they lack the historical tradition and ancestory of the Great Houses. \n\nPromoting a Noble House will elevate their status to one of the Great Houses of the Empire and secure their loyalty and service , however it may cause friction with the old established Great Houses.
STH_klingon_mechanics.1505.name: Klingon High Council
STH_klingon_mechanics.1506.desc: The arrangements are in place to raise the status of [FROM.GetName] from Noble House to one of the ruling Great Houses, despite many of within the High Council voicing their objections to the plans.
STH_klingon_mechanics.1506.name: Promote to Great House
STH_klingon_mechanics.1507.desc: [klingon_house_missing_shipyards.GetName] stands ready to receive its new Shipyards Chancellor! \n\n Which world require our protection.
STH_klingon_mechanics.1507.name: Commision a new House Shipyard
STH_klingon_mechanics.1510.desc: Feuds between the Empire and the Great Houses rob all involved of a chance for glory and honour, we should look to end the discord between the High Council and one of our Great Houses.
STH_klingon_mechanics.1510.name: Klingon High Council
STH_klingon_mechanics.158.a: Of course this Council respects the [From.GetName]...
STH_klingon_mechanics.158.desc: The [From.GetName] has expressed dissatisfaction with the direction of the [Root.Owner.GetName] for several years now. \n\nAfter a particularly heated debate in the Great Hall on [Root.Owner.Capital.GetName], $great_house_ruler$ [From.Leader.GetName] has threatened to declare Qutlh lajQo' and formally withdraw support for the High Council, except in matters of the Empire's defense.
STH_klingon_mechanics.158.name: [From.GetName] Withdraws Support
STH_klingon_mechanics.159.desc: $great_house_ruler$ [From.Leader.GetName] has expressed a willingness to withdraw [From.Leader.GetHerHis] declaration of Qutlh lajQo', and return full support to the High Council.
STH_klingon_mechanics.159.name: [From.GetName] Returns Support
STH_klingon_mechanics.160.desc: Following the death of the leader of the [popFaction.GetName], [factionLeader.GetName] has been confirmed as the new house $great_house_ruler$.
STH_klingon_mechanics.160.name: [popFaction.GetName] Leadership
STH_klingon_mechanics.1600.desc: Only the High Council has the power and influence to select a new High Chancellor, the members of the council can decide that the current Chancellor is not acting honourably and revoke his position, but be aware doing so is a grave dishonour to the House stripped of its power and they will not take it lightly.
STH_klingon_mechanics.1600.name: The Rite of Succession
STH_klingon_mechanics.1601.desc: The bellow has been given and the warning has been served to the honored dead in Sto-vo-kor, for beware, a Klingon warrior is about to arrive. [From.GetName] has served the Empire until their dying breath and now it is time to select a new High Chancellor to leader the Empire to new glorious battles.
STH_klingon_mechanics.1601.name: The Rite of Succession
STH_klingon_mechanics.164.a.tooltip: The Council will spend influence to stop the feud between [From.GetName] and [FromFrom.GetName] before it intensifies into war.
STH_klingon_mechanics.164.a: Attempt to intervene to stop the feud.
STH_klingon_mechanics.164.b.tooltip: [From.GetName] and [FromFrom.GetName] are now feuding. This may break out into war between the Houses.
STH_klingon_mechanics.164.b: Houses can defend their own honour.
STH_klingon_mechanics.164.desc.01: Tensions between the [From.GetName] and [FromFrom.GetName] have escalated following a perceived insult toward $great_house_ruler$ [FromFrom.Leader.GetName] by the [From.GetName]'s resident war poet. \n\nDeclaring a formal feud, many believe hostilities to be inevitable.
STH_klingon_mechanics.164.desc.02: Tensions between the [From.GetName] and [FromFrom.GetName] have escalated following an accusation that a $great_house_scientist$ in the service of the [FromFrom.GetName] has used the threat of rent increases to intimidate a number of shipyard workers pledged to the [From.GetName] in an area of [Root.Owner.Capital.GetName] where the $great_house_scientist$ owned several buildings. \n\nThe insinuation of underhandedness has infuriated $great_house_ruler$ [FromFrom.Leader.GetName] and the entire [FromFrom.GetName]. Declaring a formal feud, many believe hostilities to be inevitable.
STH_klingon_mechanics.164.desc.03: Tensions between the [From.GetName] and [FromFrom.GetName] have escalated following a perceived insult toward the eldest cousin of [From.Leader.GetName] by the niece of [FromFrom.Leader.GetName], with embarrassing details of a failed courtship being circulated across [Root.Owner.Capital.GetName]. \n\nWith both houses declaring a formal feud, many believe hostilities to be inevitable.
STH_klingon_mechanics.164.name: Feuding Houses
STH_klingon_mechanics.166.a.tooltip: [From.GetName] and [FromFrom.GetName] are now friends, and will aid one another.
STH_klingon_mechanics.166.desc.01: The [From.GetName] and [FromFrom.GetName] have turned a grudging respect into an enduring friendship. Furthermore, several marriages among junior members of both houses have solidified the relationship into an all but formal alliance.
STH_klingon_mechanics.166.desc.02: The [From.GetName] and [FromFrom.GetName] have turned a grudging respect into an enduring friendship. The defence of a [FromFrom.GetName] militia officer by a [From.GetName] swordsmith against a gang of thugs on the streets of [Root.Owner.Capital.GetName] has solidified the relationship into an all but formal alliance.
STH_klingon_mechanics.166.desc.03: The [From.GetName] and [FromFrom.GetName] have turned a grudging respect into an enduring friendship. A well received performance of the opera 'Aktuh and Maylota' performed by famed singers from both houses seems to signify the relationship has solidified into an all but formal alliance.
STH_klingon_mechanics.166.name: Allied Houses
STH_klingon_mechanics.168.a.tooltip: The [From.GetName] declares war on the [FromFrom.GetName], using the House Feud casus belli.
STH_klingon_mechanics.168.b: Enough! This is a waste of resources.
STH_klingon_mechanics.168.c: The [FromFrom.GetName] will prevail without the Imperial fleet.
STH_klingon_mechanics.168.d: The [FromFrom.GetName] will use all its might...
STH_klingon_mechanics.168.desc.01: The [From.GetName] and [FromFrom.GetName] have declared a formal tlhaS as both sides seek to reclaim their honour following a number of grievances against the other. \n\nBoth houses have appealed to their allies within the [Root.Owner.GetName] to bolster their ranks.
STH_klingon_mechanics.168.desc.02: The [From.GetName] and [FromFrom.GetName] have declared a formal tlhaS as both sides seek to reclaim their honour following a number of grievances against the other. \n\nBoth houses have appealed to their allies within the [Root.Owner.GetName] to bolster their ranks. Rumours circulate that [Root.Owner.GetRulerTitle] [Root.Owner.GetRulerName] may use [Root.Owner.Leader.GetHerHis] position to give unfair advantage to the [FromFrom.GetName], a move sure to draw condemnation from unaffiliated houses.
STH_klingon_mechanics.168.name: Warring Houses
STH_klingon_mechanics.170.a.tooltip: The feud between [From.GetName] and [FromFrom.GetName] has ended.
STH_klingon_mechanics.170.desc.01: The [From.GetName] and [FromFrom.GetName] have put aside their former grievances and proclaimed an end to the feud that had consumed much of their combined resources.
STH_klingon_mechanics.170.desc.02: The [From.GetName] and [FromFrom.GetName] have put aside their former grievances and proclaimed an end to the feud that had consumed much of their combined resources.
STH_klingon_mechanics.170.name: House Feud Ended
STH_klingon_mechanics.171.desc: After initially showing signs of cooling down tensions between the [From.GetName] and [FromFrom.GetName] have escalated back up following a perceived insult toward $great_house_ruler$ [FromFrom.Leader.GetName] by the [From.GetName]'s resident war poet. \n\nDeclaring a formal feud, many believe hostilities to be inevitable.
STH_klingon_mechanics.171.name: House feud heats up again
STH_klingon_mechanics.172.desc: Following the death of the previous [Root.GetRulerTitle], [newCouncilLeader.GetName] of the [newCouncilFaction.GetName] has been chosen to lead the High Council.
STH_klingon_mechanics.172.name: [newCouncilLeader.GetName] Becomes [Root.GetRulerTitle]
STH_klingon_mechanics.173.desc: [FromFrom.Leader.GetName] has seized control of the High Council having slain [From.Leader.GetName] in honourable combat. The duel marks the end of the ongoing hostilities between the [FromFrom.GetName] and the [From.GetName].
STH_klingon_mechanics.173.name: [FromFrom.Leader.GetName] Becomes [Root.GetRulerTitle]
STH_klingon_mechanics.175.desc.01: The [From.GetName] and [FromFrom.GetName] have seen relations grow cold, to the point that the alliance between the Houses has been dissolved. \n\nWhile no one single incident can be identified as root cause, a perceived insult directed at a [From.GetName] pilot by the [FromFrom.GetName]'s gin'tak seems to have been the catalyst.
STH_klingon_mechanics.175.desc.02: The [From.GetName] and [FromFrom.GetName] have seen relations grow cold, to the point that the alliance between the Houses has been dissolved. \n\nWhile no one single incident can be identified as root cause, a perceived insult directed at a [From.GetName] pilot by the [FromFrom.GetName]'s gin'tak seems to have been the catalyst.
STH_klingon_mechanics.175.name: House Feuds
STH_klingon_mechanics.2.desc: In the face of conflict with the [From.GetName], all true Klingon warriors must put aside their disputes to unite against their common enemy. \n\nThe ongoing rebellions that have plagued the Empire have formally ended.
STH_klingon_mechanics.2.name: House Divided
STH_klingon_mechanics.3.desc: The House of [Root.GetRulerName]'s rebellion has succeeded with [Root.GetRulerName]'s troops storming the High Council chambers on [Root.Capital.GetName] and executing the leaders of the previous administration. \n\nThe other Great Houses have signalled their willingness to accept the legitimacy of the House of [Root.GetRulerName]'s victory, though much needs to be done to rebuild the Empire from the conflict.
STH_klingon_mechanics.3.name: House Divided
STH_klingon_mechanics_new.100.d: Transfer a fleet to this house.
STH_klingon_mechanics_new.100.desc.dislo: nuqneH', [Root.Owner.GetRulerTitle]. I am $great_house_ruler$ [houseLeader.GetName] of the [factionCountryTemp.GetName]. Do not waste my time with idle conversation.
STH_klingon_mechanics_new.100.desc.loyal: Qapla', [Root.Owner.GetRulerTitle]! I am $great_house_ruler$ [houseLeader.GetName] of the [factionCountryTemp.GetName]. My house stands ready to serve.
STH_klingon_mechanics_new.100.desc.same_: qaleghqa'neS, $great_house_ruler$ [Root.GetRulerName]. It is I [houseLeader.GetName], Gin'tak of our house while you lead the Empire to glory. How may I serve today?
STH_klingon_mechanics_new.101.desc.dislo: We stand ready to receive stewardship of a new planet and demonstrate what true leadership looks like.
STH_klingon_mechanics_new.101.desc.loyal: Qapla', [Root.Owner.GetRulerTitle]! We stand ready to take ownership of one of the Empires mighty worlds and govern it with honour.
STH_klingon_mechanics_new.101.desc.same_: qaleghqa'neS, $great_house_ruler$ [Root.Owner.GetRulerName]. It is I [houseLeader.GetName], Gin'tak of our house while you lead the Empire to glory. We stand read to govern a world with honour in your name.
STH_klingon_mechanics_new.101.name: Planet Administration
STH_klingon_mechanics_new.102.desc.loyal: Qapla', [Root.Owner.GetRulerTitle]! We urge you to reconsider this action my Chancellor.
STH_klingon_mechanics_new.102.desc.same_: qaleghqa'neS, $great_house_ruler$ [Root.Owner.GetRulerName]. It is I [houseLeader.GetName], Gin'tak of our house while you lead the Empire to glory. As you desire my Chancellor.
STH_klingon_mechanics_new.102.name: Remove planet from Great House
STH_klingon_mechanics_new.103.desc.dislo: This dishonourable act will not go unpunished.
STH_klingon_mechanics_new.103.desc.loyal: As loyal servants of the [Root.Owner.GetName], the [factionCountryTemp.GetName] stands ready to accept any responsibility for upholding the honour of any order, or the defence of any you see fit.
STH_klingon_mechanics_new.103.name: Award Titles and Honours
STH_klingon_mechanics_new.106.desc: The Empire is in need of the services of all loyal ships and crew. We demand a fleet is placed under the control of the Imperial Navy command. Failure to comply will be seen as most dishonourable.
STH_klingon_mechanics_new.106.name: Commandeer a Fleet
STH_klingon_mechanics_new.107.desc: Consider this a gift from your Chancellor, the Imperial Navy hearby transfers an agreed fleet to your House as a sign of great faith.
STH_klingon_mechanics_new.107.name: Gift a Fleet
STH_klingon_mechanics_new.109.desc: Having transfered the planet of [factionCountryTempNewPlanet.GetName] to our loyal [factionCountryTemp.GetName] we now have the option to transfer the whole system to their control.
STH_klingon_mechanics_new.109.name: Transfer System
STH_klingon_mechanics_new.110.desc.dislo: This is another foolish and dishonorable decision by a Chancellor who knows no honour and has no understanding of success.
STH_klingon_mechanics_new.110.desc.loyal: If this is the will of our House Leader than it shall be done.
STH_klingon_mechanics_new.110.name: Remove Great House Control of a System
STH_klingon_mechanics_new.172.desc: Despite the intervention of the High Council the [From.GetName] and [FromFrom.GetName] continue their Feud and remain locked in a tense stand-off.
STH_klingon_mechanics_new.172.name: House Feud Continues
STH_klingon_mechanics_new.300.a: We Close our borders to you.
STH_klingon_mechanics_new.300.b: We Open our borders to you.
STH_klingon_mechanics_new.300.d: Offer a bribe to improve relations.
STH_klingon_mechanics_new.300.desc.bad: You dare stand in front of the mighty [factionCountryTemp.GetName]? Hahaha What can we do for your honourless empire?
STH_klingon_mechanics_new.300.desc.good: Honoured greetings to our friends in [ROOT.GetName] from the noble [factionCountryTemp.GetName], how can we aid you today?
STH_klingon_mechanics_new.300.desc.kdf: nuq DaneH, qatlh bIpumchoH? nuq DaneH, qatlh bIpumchoH?! nuq DaneH, qatlh bIpumchoH??!
STH_klingon_mechanics_new.300.desc.neutr: Greetings, [ROOT.GetName], you stand before the noble [factionCountryTemp.GetName], what is it that you require?
STH_klingon_mechanics_new.300.e: Attempt to purchase a cloaking device.
STH_klingon_mechanics_new.300.f: Transfer a fleet to this house.
STH_klingon_mechanics_new.300.i: Convince them to betray the Empire.
STH_klingon_mechanics_new.300.name: Incoming Message
STH_klingon_mechanics_new.301.desc: [factionCountryTempBribe.GetName] has accepted our offer with gratitude which has increased their opinion towards us considerably.
STH_klingon_mechanics_new.301.name: Donation has been accepted
STH_klingon_mechanics_new.302.desc: [factionCountryTempBribe.GetName] have rejected our offer claiming that their honour cannot be so easily bought. \n\nAs a result our relations with them has decreased.
STH_klingon_mechanics_new.302.name: Donation has been rejected
STH_klingon_mechanics_new.303.desc: It appears that a foreign power is attempting to forge a closer relationship with [factionCountryTempBribe.GetName]. \n\nThe dishonourable fools of [klingon_houses_bribe_country.GetName] underestimated the loyalty of [factionCountryTempBribe.GetName] and the unity of the Klingon Empire!
STH_klingon_mechanics_new.303.name: A Great House has rejected a bribe
STH_klingon_mechanics_new.304.desc: Lord Chancellor, our spies have confirmed that one of our Great Houses, [factionCountryTempBribe.GetName], has accepted a bribe from [klingon_houses_bribe_country.GetName] in a bid to form a closer bond. \n\nAs they did not openly disclose this contact we can only assume that they are colluding against the Empire!
STH_klingon_mechanics_new.304.name: A Great House has accepted a bribe
STH_klingon_mechanics_new.305.desc: Our noble House gladly accepted any spare ships that you have to offer to ensure that we continue to grow strong!
STH_klingon_mechanics_new.305.name: Fleet Transfer
STH_klingon_mechanics_new.306.desc: Our attempts to turn [factionCountryBetrayal.GetName] against the Klingon Empire has been successful, and the relationship between the Great House and its master has been considerably damaged, we must now wait to see if the House is brave enough to openly rebel against the High Command.
STH_klingon_mechanics_new.306.name: House Turns on the Empire
STH_klingon_mechanics_new.307.desc: Our efforts to turn [factionCountryBetrayal.GetName] against the Klingon Empire have failed, the fabled Klingon Honour was too strong to break and they have rejected our attempts. \n\nTime will tell if they notify the Klingon Empire of our attempts to undermine their unity, and it is unlikely the Empire will react kindly to this.
STH_klingon_mechanics_new.307.name: House Remains loyal
STH_klingon_mechanics_new.308.desc: [factionCountryBetrayal.GetName] has approached us to inform us that a 3rd party has attempted to buy their loyalty and turn them against their Empire. \n\nLike all good Klingons they placed loyalty to their chancellor above all else, a truly honourable action.
STH_klingon_mechanics_new.308.name: Great House remains loyal
STH_klingon_mechanics_new.309.desc: Our Klingon Intelligence agency has uncovered evidence that [factionCountryBetrayal.GetName] has coluded with a faction within [klingon_houses_betray_country.GetName] in a bid to turn the House against it's Empire. \n\nRelations with the House have considerably worsened as a result of this honourless action.
STH_klingon_mechanics_new.309.name: Great House willing to betray us
STH_klingon_mechanics_new.310.desc: With war declared against us, we can bring in our allies who have pledged to support us in our defensive wars. \n\nShould they agree to uphold their commitment they will join us in our battles.
STH_klingon_mechanics_new.310.name: Call for assistance
STH_klingon_mechanics_new.311.desc: We have been called upon to fullfil our defensive pledge towards [great_house_war_country.GetName] as they go to war. \n\nShould we fullfil our commitment we will join them in their defensive war.
STH_klingon_mechanics_new.311.name: A call for help
STH_klingon_mechanics_new.312.desc: Our so called allies [great_house_war_country.GetName] have failed to honour their pledge and come to our aid, we must win our wars without them.
STH_klingon_mechanics_new.312.name: Betrayed!
STH_klingon_story.1.b: No more than the rambling of a drunk.
STH_klingon_story.1.desc:
A thick pungent smoke fills the air of the Pujbe' Targh tavern as the walls echo the sound of song and laughter from the gathered warriors. [Root.GetRulerTitle] [Root.GetRulerName] found the Pujbe' Targh better suited to relieving the stresses of office; fewer Council Members and other nobles found their way to this side of the First City where common soldiers, weaponsmiths and poets dwelt. Those of high birth would drink in the QeylIs Qul where the Gagh was always fresh but the songs rang hollow. 

Standing by the vat of Blood Wine [Root.GetRulerName] sank a cup into the crimson liquid and drank deep from it.

'I tell you, I can find the sword!', an old woman nearby hisses to a companion who mutters back and walks away. The old woman moves to a table by the wall and hunches over her drink. 

'What sword do you seek?' [Root.GetRulerName] asks, intrigued. The old woman turns and her face soon twists in recognition. 

'You're [Root.GetRulerTitle] [Root.GetRulerName]! Here!? You honour us...', she raises her cup in salute. Leaning in she says, 'My name is Le'tor and I'll tell you what I seek. Nothing less than the Sword of Kahless.' 

'You know where it is?' [Root.GetRulerName]'s eyes went wide at the name. 

'No, but I know where to start looking. All we need is a ship and I think you have a few of those.' The woman reached into her tunic and pulled forth an ancient looking datapad. 

'This is Hur'q, I'm sure it shows the route the petaQ's followed home after we drove them from Qo'nos. This is the key!' she says as she offers the pad to [Root.GetRulerName].
STH_klingon_story.1.name: The Sword of Kahless
STH_klingon_story.10.desc: The Hur'q evacuation documentation is extensive, listing the routes back to Hur'q space that each transport ship was to take, apparently by way of a wormhole. One item stands out: a cargo ship with a manifest labelled 'alien artefacts', its destination listed as a storage facility on an uninhabitable world far from here.
STH_klingon_story.10.name: The Sword of Kahless
STH_klingon_story.1000.b: This does not sound like an honourable venture.
STH_klingon_story.1000.d: No, this is not the Klingon way.
STH_klingon_story.1000.desc:
[Root.GetRulerTitle], my name is [antaak.GetName], a doctor attached to the Imperial Fleet. I would not wish to dishonour you with trivial matters, but I believe I have discovered an opportunity of enormous potential for the Klingon people. 

Recently we have received news of genetically engineered Humans demonstrating strength and guile that surpass even the mightiest of Klingon warriors. We can NOT allow these aliens to hold an advantage over us. 

With your permission I would like to conduct a series of experiments to reverse engineer their genetic enhancements, with the objective of applying them to our finest soldiers.
STH_klingon_story.1000.name: Incoming Transmission - Doctor Antaak
STH_klingon_story.1001.b: This does not sound like an honourable venture.
STH_klingon_story.1001.d: No, this is not the Klingon way.
STH_klingon_story.1001.desc: [Root.GetRulerTitle], I'm aware you rejected my proposal to perform trials on genetically engineered Human DNA, but I must request you reconsider. I truly believe I have discovered an opportunity of enormous potential for the Klingon people. \n\nWith your permission I would like to conduct a series of experiments to reverse engineer their genetic enhancements, with the objective of applying them to our finest soldiers.
STH_klingon_story.1001.name: Incoming Transmission - Doctor Antaak
STH_klingon_story.1003.a: Proceed with your original energy budget.
STH_klingon_story.1003.c: The risk is too great. Halt the trials.
STH_klingon_story.1003.desc: [Root.GetRulerTitle], our initial trials with Human Augment DNA have been successful. We are now ready to proceed to the next phase - experiments on live subjects. \n\nThe resources I have are adequate to the task, but the results may be improved if we could have access to more energy.
STH_klingon_story.1003.name: Incoming Transmission - Doctor Antaak
STH_klingon_story.1005.b: Apply superior reflexes and strength DNA.
STH_klingon_story.1005.d: The risk is too great. Halt the trials.
STH_klingon_story.1005.desc:
The trials have succeeded - we now understand how to integrate Human Augment DNA into a test subject. 

All that is left to do is choose which traits we wish to integrate. Unfortunately certain incompatibilities prevent us from applying both. 

Once chosen there is nothing to prevent us from applying these changes to the entire Klingon population! 

The only minor side-effect is the potential loss of certain Klingon cosmetic features...
STH_klingon_story.1005.name: Incoming Transmission - Doctor Antaak
STH_klingon_story.1006.desc: [Root.GetRulerTitle]! The unthinkable has happened - the virus we were using as a control vector for the Human Augment DNA insertion has mutated. The population of [augmentTestColony.GetName] have all been infected now. \n\nWhile most are expected to recover, the positive DNA augmentations failed to take root, leaving only the cosmetic changes to the infected. We need more medical experts on the ground.
STH_klingon_story.1006.name: Incoming Transmission - Doctor Antaak
STH_klingon_story.1007.desc: The Human Augment virus that started on [augmentTestColony.GetName] has spread across the entirety of the [Root.GetName]. Warriors and civilians alike are enraged at the mutations that have left them deformed imitations of the Human aliens. \n\nTalk across [Root.GetSpeciesName] space is of rebellion against [Root.GetRulerTitle] [Root.GetRulerName]'s rule.
STH_klingon_story.1007.name: Augmented Realities
STH_klingon_story.1008.desc: The [augmentTestColony.GetName] colony has been spared, and from it the Human Augment virus has spread across the [Root.GetName].
STH_klingon_story.1008.name: Augmented Realities
STH_klingon_story.1009.desc: The [augmentTestColony.GetName] colony has been utterly destroyed, and with it the risk the Human Augment virus contained.
STH_klingon_story.1009.name: Augmented Realities
STH_klingon_story.1010.desc: The [augmentTestColony.GetName] colony has been utterly destroyed, but not before a number of outbreaks of the Human Augment virus have been reported across the [Root.GetName]. The destruction of [augmentTestColony.GetName] now looks to have been for nothing...
STH_klingon_story.1010.name: Augmented Realities
STH_klingon_story.1011.a.tooltip: [Root.GetName] stands divided with some of the Great Houses supporting [rebelHouseCountry.GetName], and others pledging their loyalty to [Root.GetRulerTitle] [Root.GetRulerName].\nCivil War begins.
STH_klingon_story.1011.desc: In the aftermath of the anger from the Human Augment virus that has rampaged across [Root.GetName] space, the [rebelHouseCountry.GetName] have declared open revolt, vowing to overthrow [Root.GetRulerTitle] [Root.GetRulerName].
STH_klingon_story.1011.name: Augmented Realities
STH_klingon_story.1012.desc: In the aftermath of the anger from the Human Augment virus that has rampaged across [Root.GetName] space, a number of Great Houses have openly declared their discontent. But despite all that, [Root.GetRulerTitle] [Root.GetRulerName] have managed to calm down the situation and ultimately keep [Root.GetName] united.
STH_klingon_story.1012.name: Augmented Realities
STH_klingon_story.1013.desc: After years of fruitless searching, [Root.GetSpeciesName] scientists have finally found a candidate for a cure to the Human Augment virus which has afflicted our people. \n\nA concentrated effort is needed to turn the theory into practice, but with enough will our people can be whole again.
STH_klingon_story.1013.name: Augmented Realities
STH_klingon_story.1014.desc: The Human Augment virus has been cured, and our people have returned to their original appearance. We are [Root.GetSpeciesName] name again!
STH_klingon_story.1014.name: Augmented Realities
STH_klingon_story.11.desc: Seven crew members of the [Root.GetFleetName] died attempting to locate the vault, crushed and incinerated as their environmental suits failed under the pressure and heat. [Root.GetLeaderName], leading the last leg of the expedition from the front, was unperturbed. \n\nAfter months of exploring the cave networks across the southern highlands, at last a faint energy signature has been discovered. Beaming to the location [Root.GetLeaderName] is presented with a Hur'q forcefield barring the way to the airlock of the storage vault.
STH_klingon_story.11.name: The Sword of Kahless
STH_klingon_story.2.desc:
Spending nearly a month analysis the Hur'q datapad, the [Root.GetRulerTitle] and a few trusted members of the House of [Root.GetRulerName] have at last uncovered a clue to the location of the Sword. 

The pad contains logistics documentation for the Hur'q invasion forces just prior to their expulsion from Qo'nos, following their supply lines back may lead us to the sword they stole. 

Most of the data is corrupted or encrypted beyond our technology to unlock, however one of the few accessible files points to abandoned base here in our own system. The base was located on the aptly named moon of Veqlargh, Hur'q.
STH_klingon_story.2.name: The Sword of Kahless
STH_klingon_story.20.desc: The approximate location of the Hur'q medical facility on [swordOfKahless2Target.GetName] has been identified.
STH_klingon_story.20.name: The Sword of Kahless
STH_klingon_story.2000.desc_01: Reports are coming in from the Khitomer system, hostile ships have been sighted at the edge of the system with weapons active. The planetary defences around Khitomer do not seem to be responding and there is a thriving colony of Klingons living on the planet. This could become a massacre.
STH_klingon_story.2000.desc_02: An armada of attack ships have been reported heading deep into the Khitomer system, our outer system defences appear ineffectual, leaving the planet open to attack. Many in the high council fear that this could become a massacre.
STH_klingon_story.2000.name: Khitomer System under attack
STH_klingon_story.2001.a: Prepare to send the klingons aid.
STH_klingon_story.2001.b: Leave the Klingons to deal with the situation.
STH_klingon_story.2001.desc: Our scans have picked up a series of distress calls from the Klingon world of Khitomer, they are under attack from an unknown assailant and their defensive systems have been bypassed leaving the colony open to a devastating attack. We could dispatch a fleet of ships to investigate or leave the Klingons to deal with this internally.
STH_klingon_story.2001.name: Khitomer System under attack
STH_klingon_story.2002.desc: Our scans have picked up a series of distress calls from the Klingon world of Khitomer, they are under attack from an unknown assailant and their defensive systems have been bypassed leaving the colony open to a devastating attack. It is unclear what will become of the planet or its inhabitants.
STH_klingon_story.2002.name: Khitomer System under attack
STH_klingon_story.2003.desc: Chancellor [Root.GetRulerName] our defences in the Khitomer System have failed us, it appears that they have been sabotaged allowing a fleet of vessels through. Our warriors on the luna colonies have already perished at the hands of these cowardly fiends. Our experts say that cannot restore our defences and fleet coordination in time to prevent widespread losses. Should we call for aid or sacrifice our honourable warriors?
STH_klingon_story.2003.name: Devastating Attack in Khitomer System
STH_klingon_story.2004.desc: [Root.GetRulerTitle] [Root.GetRulerName] the Klingon Empire has called for aid in defending the Khitomer system from attack, it is rare that the Empire seeks help from outsiders, so the situation must be dire. A fleet and one of our finest leaders must be sent to the system at once.
STH_klingon_story.2004.name: Klingons call for aid
STH_klingon_story.2005.a: Our pride shall not end lives.
STH_klingon_story.2005.b: We are Klingons, we need no one else.
STH_klingon_story.2005.desc: [Root.GetRulerTitle] [Root.GetRulerName] the aid from our so called allies arrived too late to ward off the attack against the planet, Early indications show widespread devastation and loss of life. Efforts to rebuild the colony could take many years and many in the medical division do not believe that we can help those in immediate peril without inviting the orbiting rescue fleet the chance to prove their worth.
STH_klingon_story.2005.name: Khitomer: Arrived too late
STH_klingon_story.2006.desc: Despite the best efforts of our fleet we did not arrive in time to ward off the attack against Khitomer, initial scans show huge devastation to the main settlement and heavy loss of life. From this range we cannot tell who instigated this attack, but it is clear that all is not well within the Klingon High Command. However, our chance to help is not over, the Klingon authorities have asked us for additional help in assessing the damage and providing aid to those in immediate risk on the planet's surface.
STH_klingon_story.2006.name: Khitomer: Arrived too late
STH_klingon_story.2007.desc: Despite the best efforts of our fleet we did not arrive in time to ward off the attack against Khitomer, initial scans show huge devastation to the main settlement and heavy loss of life. From this range we cannot tell who instigated this attack, but it is clear that all is not well within the Klingon High Command. The Klingons are refusing any further help and have 'politely' asked us to leave their space before they consider us a target. We should leave before they turn their anger out on us. The people on the planet will need to fend for themselves.
STH_klingon_story.2007.name: Khitomer: Arrived too late
STH_klingon_story.2008.desc: Sir, our fleet in the Khitomer system have arrived just in time to catch the perpetrators in the act. It appears a fleet of Romulan warships are preparing for a fresh assault against the surface. The ships match no known Imperial warbirds, which could suggest they belong to the infamous Tal Shiar, if this is the case the Romulan senate will deny all knowledge of the attack. Our forces are in position to help repel the attack, but this will endanger [Root] lives and possibly future relations with the Romulan Star Empire. Failing to help will be seen as an act of dishonour by the Klingons.
STH_klingon_story.2008.name: Khitomer: Attack in progress
STH_klingon_story.2015.desc_01: Chancellor [Root.GetRulerName] the honourless petaQ Tal Shiar forces have been defeated with the assistance of our allies [rescueCountry.GetName]. The damage done to the colony is still substantial and reports from the surface indicate there are still warriors and civilians in dire need of assistance in the major settlements. The old adage that Klingons make fine warriors, but lousy doctors rings very true right now. Should we invite our allies to the surface to aid us?
STH_klingon_story.2015.desc_02: Chancellor [Root.GetRulerName] our brave Klingon warriors have won the day, all Tal Shiar forces have been wiped out without the help of our cowardly neighbours. Despite their lack of desire for battle we could still use their assistance saving lives on the planet's surface, should we seek further help?
STH_klingon_story.2015.name: Khitomer defended
STH_klingon_story.2016.a: Condemn the Romulans and provide help.
STH_klingon_story.2016.desc: [rescueCountry.GetLeaderName] All Tal Shiar forces have been defeated, as expected they have left no trace of evidence that the ships originated from Romulus and no prisoners were taken during the assault, many voices from within are urging us to condemn the sneak attack and publicly blame the Romulans. Additionally we have received word from Q'ono'S that they would welcome an away team down the main colony to help look for survivors.
STH_klingon_story.2016.name: Khitomer defended
STH_klingon_story.2017.desc: [rescueCountry.GetLeaderName] All Tal Shiar forces have been defeated, as expected they have left no trace of evidence that the ships originated from Romulus and no prisoners were taken during the assault, many voices from within are urging us to condemn the sneak attack and publicly blame the Romulans. In true Klingon fashion their homeworld has declined any further interference from outside forces and we have been asked to leave their space quickly. It appears we have done all we can here.
STH_klingon_story.2017.name: Khitomer defended
STH_klingon_story.2018.a: We came to aid the Klingons.
STH_klingon_story.2018.desc: Our away teams are ready to head to the planet's surface, our preliminary analysis suggests that the romulans were after specific intel and research that appears to have been underway. With the disarray that is taking place on the planet we have the opportunity to obtain this information and boost our standings with the Romulans or continue our mission of peace and look to cement a better relationship with the Klingons.
STH_klingon_story.2018.name: Send a team to Khitomer
STH_klingon_story.2019.a: He is welcome to join us.
STH_klingon_story.2019.b: The orphan's place is with his own kind.
STH_klingon_story.2019.desc: Thanks to the dedication and tireless efforts by our teams we have managed to salvage a lot of the infrastructure on the surface and rescue a great many lives that would have otherwise perished. The colony should be back on its feet in relatively short order. One of our teams also found a small orphaned Klingon boy amongst the ruins, he has asked to stay with us and is seemingly quite attached to our way of life. What we have achieved here today should go along way to building bonds between our two worlds.
STH_klingon_story.2019.name: Khitomer: Aid delivered successfully
STH_klingon_story.2020.desc: Our efforts have made a small headway in repairing the damage to Khitomer, which should speed up the time it takes for the planet to fully recover from the damage done during the sneak attack. The Klingons are mildly thankful for our efforts and it looks like this will go some way to building a better relationship between our worlds.
STH_klingon_story.2020.name: Khitomer: Sufficient help provided
STH_klingon_story.2021.desc: Our efforts to help have failed to provide sufficient help to those on the planet's surface, the damage done to the infrastructure was worse than our initial scans unveiled and our plans to help have only made a bad situation worse. The Klingons have reacted poorly to this news and we have failed to secure the boost to our relationship that many back home hoped for.
STH_klingon_story.2021.name: Khitomer: Further damage done
STH_klingon_story.2022.desc: We have managed to secure the data that the Tal Shiar was after, right underneath the Klingon's noses, plus we have managed to cover our tracks so the authorities have no clue that we have managed to complete the work started by the agents. Our contacts in the Romulan secret agency will be eager to hear from us and would pay a small future to obtain this data.
STH_klingon_story.2022.name: Khitomer: Klingon research data found
STH_klingon_story.2030.desc: Our fleet has arrived at the edge of the Khitomer system, we can see that the planetary defense systems have been powered down, it is unclear why or what happened to allow this to take place. Even at this distance we can see that the focus of the attack appears to be the Klingon settlement on the planet Khitomer and our long range scans can see fires raging on the world's surface. We cannot find any evidence of who is responsible for the attack, all we can do now is wait for a response from the High Command.
STH_klingon_story.2030.name: Arrived at Khitomer
STH_klingon_story.2031.desc: Chancellor! A monumental effort has gone into helping the survivors of Khitomer our allies, the [rescueCountry.GetName] have done a truly honourable job in aiding those in need. Songs will song of the deeds done here today and the new allies we have made here today forged in battle and in defending the weak. As feared all evidence of the attack was destroyed by the assailant, but many suspect this was the work of the honourless Tal Shiar. This has been a major event in the course of the quadrant.
STH_klingon_story.2031.name: Aid sent to Khitomer
STH_klingon_story.2032.desc: Chancellor! The combined efforts of our forces and the aid provided from the outsiders have managed to render enough aid to the colony on Khitomer that should mean any lingering damage will not take long to undo. Our thoughts turn to revenge and many in the council chambers would rather focus on reclaiming our honour instead of focusing on the united efforts to save lives. This has been a major event shaping the future of the beta quadrant.
STH_klingon_story.2032.name: Aid sent to Khitomer
STH_klingon_story.2033.desc: Chancellor! Despite our best efforts and those of our so-called allies the death toll and damage done to the infrastructure of Khitomer continues to climb, this truly is a disaster. Anger and a desire for revenge against friend and foe alike is high. Our warriors demand a chance to strike back against those who have wronged us.
STH_klingon_story.2033.name: Aid sent to Khitomer
STH_klingon_story.2034.desc: [rescueCountry.GetTitle] [rescueCountry.GetLeaderName] the attack against the Klingon world appears to have been devastating, and the death toll is still climbing. Unfortunately we were unable to identify the attackers and they have fled the scene. The Klingons have always been a insular race so it is only appropriate we wait for a decision from them before we make any further decisions.
STH_klingon_story.2034.name: Devastating Attack in Khitomer System
STH_klingon_story.2040.desc: Our operatives in the Tal Shiar have compiled a report on a secret unsanctioned mission deep into Klingon space. They obtained the planetary defence codes from a source within the Klingon government and were able to send a task force into the their space to attack the planet and secure critical research data from a hidden research outpost.
STH_klingon_story.2040.name: Report from the Tal Shiar
STH_klingon_story.2041.desc: The young orphan calls himself Worf and he is eager to repay the debt in saving his life. He has asked that we sponsor his attendance at our military academy and has promised to server with honour.
STH_klingon_story.2041.name: Potential new recruit
STH_klingon_story.2042.desc: The young orphan calls himself Worf and he is eager to repay the debt in saving his life. He has asked that we sponsor his attendance at our military academy and has promised to server with honour. He would make a fine warrior in the KDF.
STH_klingon_story.2042.name: Potential new recruit
STH_klingon_story.2043.desc: [rescueCountry.GetTitle] [rescueCountry.GetLeaderName] after completing his training and proving himself multiples times, the first Klingon officer is ready to join our ranks as a new heroic admiral.
STH_klingon_story.2043.name: Worf, New Hero graduates
STH_klingon_story.2044.desc: [rescueCountry.GetTitle] [rescueCountry.GetLeaderName] after completing his training and proving himself multiples times, the new Klingon officer is ready to join our ranks as a heroic admiral. This is a glorious day for the empire as the son of Mogh joins the battle.
STH_klingon_story.2044.name: Worf, New Hero graduates
STH_klingon_story.21.desc:
Their Bat'leths cutting a path through the dense foliage, the expedition force have located the remains of a hospital facility and pharmaceutical research centre. The building complex has been gutted of equipment. 

The expedition force comes across a group of aliens with smooth bald heads and light orange skin, cowering in a cellar. They're forced to the surface and interrogated brutally by the expedition leader. 

The aliens are survivors from starship that crashed on this world months ago. They found the facility as empty as we did with one exception, a single paper book which is now ours. 

After careful study, the book is revealed as little more than a medical journal...
STH_klingon_story.21.name: The Sword of Kahless
STH_klingon_story.22.desc:
While at first the medical journal seemed to be a dead end in the quest, it has in fact given us a new location to investigate. 

Deep in the pages of the journal a Hur'q author makes reference to the location and travel times between five Hur'q bases in this part of the galaxy. 

We know all of them except one, a seafloor research facility on an ocean world. By process of triangulation and correction for stellar drift we are able pinpoint its location.
STH_klingon_story.22.name: The Sword of Kahless
STH_klingon_story.30.desc: The approximate location of the underwater Hur'q facility on [swordOfKahless3Target.GetName] has been identified.
STH_klingon_story.30.name: The Sword of Kahless
STH_klingon_story.3001.desc: It comes a time that the Empire must celebrate the role that our warriors play in furthering the Empires interests, and a warrior from the Great House of Mogh has demonstrated his valor in a number of border skirmishes along our border with the Romulans. \n\nThe planet [narendra_planet.GetName] will host a number of celebrations in our hnour of our glorious warriors.
STH_klingon_story.3001.name: Celebration of a Local Hero
STH_klingon_story.3002.b: It is not worth the effort.
STH_klingon_story.3002.desc: My Praetor, I am [romulan_narendra_leader.GetName] and I bring you a report from our Tal Shiar operatives within Klingon Space.\n\nThose brutish fools are currently engaging in a celebration of some foolish warrior's supposed victory against the might of the Imperial Navy. These continued insults against us are now erroding the public support for both the Imperial Navy and the Tal Shiar. We have taken it upon ourselves to prepare an attack against this colony that thanks to our intel gathered will not lead back to us.
STH_klingon_story.3002.name: Disrespect from the Klingons
STH_klingon_story.3003.desc: Our agents report that they have successfully delivered their attack against the Klingon colony, the first wave of the attack has dealt a devastating blow to the colony's defenses and military installations. The strike force remains undetected and will launch a further attack the moment the next window arrives.
STH_klingon_story.3003.name: Attack Successfully completed
STH_klingon_story.3004.desc: Our defenses on [narendra_planet.GetName] are reporting they have been overwhelmed by a sneak attack by unknown forces. The initial wave of the attack has destroyed our defenses, leaving the civilians vulnerable to a further attack. \n\nWe must call for aid.
STH_klingon_story.3004.name: [narendra_planet.GetName] is under attack!
STH_klingon_story.3005.b: Klingons do not cry for help.
STH_klingon_story.3005.desc: With our forces close to [narendra_planet.GetName] damaged and unable to render aid, we must do the honourable thing and protect the lives of those who cannot fight and call for help allowing for our warriors to regroup and fight like true Klingons!
STH_klingon_story.3005.name: [narendra_planet.GetName] is under attack!
STH_klingon_story.3006.desc: To anyone who can hear our message, I am [klingon_sos_leader.GetName] of the Klingon Empire, our planet is under attack from an unknown foe, they have breached our defenses and are preparing to deal the final blow against civilians. \n\nWe call on any ship in the vicinity to aid the Empire in its time of need.
STH_klingon_story.3006.name: Klingons Call for Help
STH_klingon_story.3007.desc: Only one foreign power received our SOS call, and the Federation has refused to answer our call to arms. We must now deal with this threat on our own.
STH_klingon_story.3007.name: No help coming
STH_klingon_story.3008.a.tooltip: This option will cost more, but will allow our ship to arrive at the destination quickly in order to save more lives, but at greater risk to the ship and crew.
STH_klingon_story.3008.desc: [This.GetName] stands ready to aid the Klingons at [narendra_destination.GetName], intel on the situation is limited, but we do know a large force of cloaked vessels are preparing a final attack on the helpless colony. \n\nThe odds of defeating the enemy ships is low and the likelihood of survival is not in our favour, but whatever time we can bring to allow the Klingons to evacuate and bring in reinforcements will save lives!
STH_klingon_story.3008.name: [This.GetName] ready to aid the Klingons
STH_klingon_story.3009.desc:
As [narendra_ship.GetName] arrives at the scene of the devastation, it is clear from the ash clouds covering the planets that the attack had been devastating and that the colony would not be able to stand any more of the assault. 

Suddenly the [narendra_ship.GetName] picks up a decloaking fleet or warbirds on a direct course with the planet, with only the Starfleet ship standing in their way. 

The [narendra_ship.GetName] must hold the line until help can arrive.
STH_klingon_story.3009.name: Battle of [narendra_destination.GetName]
STH_klingon_story.3010.a: They gave their lives to save others.
STH_klingon_story.3010.desc: The destruction of [FromFrom.GetName] will be felt across the Federation, the ship and crew gave their lives defending civilians, holding out long enough for the Klingons to send reinforcements to take out the warbirds. \n\nTheir sacrifice will live on in history as upholding some of the truest values of Starfleet. [sacrificed_leader.GetName] will live on as a hero.
STH_klingon_story.3010.name: [FromFrom.GetName] destroyed defending the Klingons
STH_klingon_story.3011.desc: We have received word from our forces in Klingon Space, it appears the humans once interfered in our affairs with their Flagship sacrificing itself to defend the Klingons. \n\nOnce again the Federation has caused us problems, one day they will truly pay for their insolence.
STH_klingon_story.3011.name: Starfleet Intervenes
STH_klingon_story.3012.a: They should be honoured as great warriors.
STH_klingon_story.3012.b: It was a fine act, no more.
