Having landed on [STH_relic_hunters_mark_country.Capital.GetName], the team must now decide upon how to discover the exact location of the [STH_relic_hunters_mark_country.GetVaultName]:

As the [STH_relic_hunters_karemman_country.GetName] has a local branch office, the team will consult with the local Head Trader to gain useful information.

[Root.GetTeamDescription] [Root.GetTeamShip] [Root.GetTeamSupplies]
Having landed on [STH_relic_hunters_mark_country.Capital.GetName], the team must now decide upon how to discover the exact location of the [STH_relic_hunters_mark_country.GetVaultName]:

As the [STH_relic_hunters_norcadian_country.GetName] has a local branch office, the team will consult with the local Arena Controller to gain useful information.

[Root.GetTeamDescription] [Root.GetTeamShip] [Root.GetTeamSupplies]
Having landed on [STH_relic_hunters_mark_country.Capital.GetName], the team must now decide upon how to discover the exact location of the [STH_relic_hunters_mark_country.GetVaultName]:

As the [STH_relic_hunters_orion_syndicate_country.GetName] has a local branch office, the team will consult with the local Boss to gain useful information.

[Root.GetTeamDescription] [Root.GetTeamShip] [Root.GetTeamSupplies]
Having landed on [STH_relic_hunters_mark_country.Capital.GetName], the team must now decide upon how to discover the exact location of the [STH_relic_hunters_mark_country.GetVaultName]:

As the [STH_relic_hunters_yridian_country.GetName] has a local branch office, the team will consult with the local Head Broker to gain useful information.
STH_relic_hunters.720.hopeful: Hopefully they will be willing to help the team...
STH_relic_hunters.721.desc_location_deci:
[Root.GetTeamDescription] [Root.GetTeamShip] [Root.GetTeamSupplies]
Having landed on [STH_relic_hunters_mark_country.Capital.GetName], the team must now decide upon how to discover the exact location of the [STH_relic_hunters_mark_country.GetVaultName]:

The team lead has decided that the best course of action, until another option presents itself, is to interrogate random citizens about where their government might store valuable relics.
STH_relic_hunters.722.desc_location_deci:
[Root.GetTeamDescription] [Root.GetTeamShip] [Root.GetTeamSupplies]
Having landed on [STH_relic_hunters_mark_country.Capital.GetName], the team must now decide upon how to discover the exact location of the [STH_relic_hunters_mark_country.GetVaultName]:

The team lead has decided that the best course of action is to seek temporary off-the-record employment as guards or security consultants to find out where the government might store valuable relics.
STH_relic_hunters.723.desc_location_deci:
[Root.GetTeamDescription] [Root.GetTeamShip] [Root.GetTeamSupplies]
Having landed on [STH_relic_hunters_mark_country.Capital.GetName], the team must now decide upon how to discover the exact location of the [STH_relic_hunters_mark_country.GetVaultName]:

The team lead has decided that the best course of action, until another option presents itself, is to slowly infiltrate the city networks, keeping to the shadows and trying to find out about where the government might store valuable relics.
STH_relic_hunters.724.desc_location_deci:
[Root.GetTeamDescription] [Root.GetTeamShip] [Root.GetTeamSupplies]
Having landed on [STH_relic_hunters_mark_country.Capital.GetName], the team must now decide upon how to discover the exact location of the [STH_relic_hunters_mark_country.GetVaultName]:

The team lead has decided that the best course of action is to seek employment in cultural institutions and museums to find out where the government might store valuable relics.
STH_relic_hunters.725.desc_location_deci: [Root.GetTeamDescription] [Root.GetTeamShip] [Root.GetTeamSupplies]\nAfter some negotiations and paying several bribes to meet the correct people, the team leader managed to gain an audience with the local Sub-Nagus. They approved of the heist and directed the team to the [STH_relic_hunters_mark_country.GetVaultName] containing the cultural heritage of the [STH_relic_hunters_mark_country.GetName].

[Root.GetTeamDescription] [Root.GetTeamShip] [Root.GetTeamSupplies]\nAs full-blooded Ferengi, the wise decision is to pay (literally) respects to the Sub-Nagus, and in return gain the full support of the local Ferengi branch office. The [STH_relic_hunters_mark_country.GetVaultName] containing the cultural heritage of the [STH_relic_hunters_mark_country.GetName] was immediately located, and the local Sub-Nagus gave the team insights into local trading customs and laws, as well as several corrupt officals of interest who may be persuaded to part with some cultural treasures.

[Root.GetTeamDescription] [Root.GetTeamShip] [Root.GetTeamSupplies]\nAfter some negotiations and selling off some cargo, the team leader managed to gain an audience with the local Head Trader. They directed the team to the main [STH_relic_hunters_mark_country.GetVaultName] containing the cultural heritage of the [STH_relic_hunters_mark_country.GetName].

[Root.GetTeamDescription] [Root.GetTeamShip] [Root.GetTeamSupplies]\nAfter some negotiations and participating in some Tsunkatse matches, the team leader managed to gain an audience with the local Arena Controller. They directed the team to the main [STH_relic_hunters_mark_country.GetVaultName] containing the cultural heritage of the [STH_relic_hunters_mark_country.GetName].

[Root.GetTeamDescription] [Root.GetTeamShip] [Root.GetTeamSupplies]\nAfter some negotiations and committing several crimes to establish trust, the team leader managed to gain an audience with the local Boss. They gave permission for the heist and directed the team to the [STH_relic_hunters_mark_country.GetVaultName] containing the cultural heritage of the [STH_relic_hunters_mark_country.GetName].

[Root.GetTeamDescription] [Root.GetTeamShip] [Root.GetTeamSupplies]\nAs card-carrying members of the Syndicate, the team has gained the full support of the local Syndicate branch office. The [STH_relic_hunters_mark_country.GetVaultName] containing the cultural heritage of the [STH_relic_hunters_mark_country.GetName] was immediately located, and the local Boss gave the team more powerful weapons, schematics of the building, and credentials for the outer layers of the defences.

[Root.GetTeamDescription] [Root.GetTeamShip] [Root.GetTeamSupplies]\nAfter some negotiations and telling the local brokers some juicy rumors, the team leader managed to gain an audience with the local Head Broker. They gave permission for the heist and directed the team to the [STH_relic_hunters_mark_country.GetVaultName] containing the cultural heritage of the [STH_relic_hunters_mark_country.GetName].

[Root.GetTeamDescription] [Root.GetTeamShip] [Root.GetTeamSupplies]\nAs full-blooded Yridians, the best decision is to inform the Head Broker of the heist, and in return gain the full support of the local Yridian branch office. The [STH_relic_hunters_mark_country.GetVaultName] containing the cultural heritage of the [STH_relic_hunters_mark_country.GetName] was immediately located, and the local Head Broker gave the team blackmail material on the facility guards, credentials for the inner layers of the defences, and concrete rumours of a secret inner vault inside of the original.
STH_relic_hunters.725.title: The local branch office was helpful!
STH_relic_hunters.726.desc_location_deci: [Root.GetTeamDescription] [Root.GetTeamShip] [Root.GetTeamSupplies]\nAfter several unhelpful rounds of interrogation, the team was able to catch a [STH_relic_hunters_mark_country.GetSpeciesName] maintainence worker that is employed at the [STH_relic_hunters_mark_country.GetVaultName]. After disposing of the last witness, the team heads out. A trail of bodies was left behind them...
STH_relic_hunters.727.desc_location_deci: [Root.GetTeamDescription] [Root.GetTeamShip] [Root.GetTeamSupplies]\nDisaster! The team had just barely started interrogating a random citizen when they were spotted by [STH_relic_hunters_mark_country.GetInternalSecurityName] agents! They managed to kill the officers before they reported the disturbance. The team needs to be more cautious...

[Root.GetTeamDescription] [Root.GetTeamShip] [Root.GetTeamSupplies]\nDisaster! The team had just barely started interrogating a random citizen when they were spotted by [STH_relic_hunters_mark_country.GetInternalSecurityName] agents! They were unable to kill the officers before they reported the fight. The team leader was captured when the response team arrived, and told the interrogators who sent them!

[Root.GetTeamDescription] [Root.GetTeamShip] [Root.GetTeamSupplies]\nDisaster! The team had just barely started interrogating a random citizen when they were spotted by [STH_relic_hunters_mark_country.GetInternalSecurityName] agents! They were unable to kill the officers before they reported the fight. The team leader was captured when the response team arrived, and told the interrogators who sent them! The [STH_relic_hunters_mark_country.GetName] is not tolerant of tresspassers, and the rest of the team were executed or enslaved.
STH_relic_hunters.728.desc_location_deci: [Root.GetTeamDescription] [Root.GetTeamShip] [Root.GetTeamSupplies]\nThe team was able to find employment in a number of minor bodyguard and security guard roles, until their last employer mentioned that a position recently opened up at a [STH_relic_hunters_mark_country.GetVaultName]. The team suits up and heads over to inquire about the position.
STH_relic_hunters.729.desc_location_deci: [Root.GetTeamDescription] [Root.GetTeamShip] [Root.GetTeamSupplies]\nDisaster! The team had just started talking with their prospective employer when a team of [STH_relic_hunters_mark_country.GetInternalSecurityName] agents stormed the building! The job was a sting operation to flush out petty criminals, and the team has gotten caught up in it! Fortunatly, the team was able to shoot their way out, but now they are being hunted by [STH_relic_hunters_mark_country.GetInternalSecurityName] agents.

[Root.GetTeamDescription] [Root.GetTeamShip] [Root.GetTeamSupplies]\nDisaster! The team had just started talking with their prospective employer when a team of [STH_relic_hunters_mark_country.GetInternalSecurityName] agents stormed the building! The job was a sting operation to flush out petty criminals, and the team has gotten caught up in it! The team was unable to shoot their way out, and were captured! The team lead told the interrogators about our involvement!
STH_relic_hunters.730.desc_location_deci: [Root.GetTeamDescription] [Root.GetTeamShip] [Root.GetTeamSupplies]\nThe team spends weeks perusing a number of news and information sites about where [STH_relic_hunters_mark_country.GetSpeciesNamePlural] store their cultural artifacts. The team was able to discover the exact location of a [STH_relic_hunters_mark_country.GetVaultName] on a poorly configured site that stores information on the [STH_relic_hunters_mark_country.GetName] and its cultural history.
STH_relic_hunters.731.desc_location_deci: [Root.GetTeamDescription] [Root.GetTeamShip] [Root.GetTeamSupplies]\nDisaster! The team had just barely started infiltrating the network when they were discovered by [STH_relic_hunters_mark_country.GetInternalSecurityName] counterintelligence programs! They managed to disable them before they reported the intrusion. The team needs to be more cautious...

[Root.GetTeamDescription] [Root.GetTeamShip] [Root.GetTeamSupplies]\nDisaster! The team had just barely started infiltrating the network when they were discovered by [STH_relic_hunters_mark_country.GetInternalSecurityName] counterintelligence programs! They were unable to disable them before they reported the intrusion. The team leader was captured when the response team arrived, and told the interrogators who sent them!

[Root.GetTeamDescription] [Root.GetTeamShip] [Root.GetTeamSupplies]\nDisaster! The team had just barely started infiltrating the network when they were discovered by [STH_relic_hunters_mark_country.GetInternalSecurityName] counterintelligence programs! They were unable to disable them before they reported the intrusion. The team leader was captured when the response team arrived, and told the interrogators who sent them! The [STH_relic_hunters_mark_country.GetName] is not tolerant of tresspassers, and the rest of the team were executed or enslaved.
STH_relic_hunters.732.desc_location_deci: [Root.GetTeamDescription] [Root.GetTeamShip] [Root.GetTeamSupplies]\nThe team was able to find employment in a number of entry level museum positions, until their last employer mentioned that a position recently opened up at a [STH_relic_hunters_mark_country.GetVaultName]. The team suits up and heads over to inquire about the position.
STH_relic_hunters.733.desc_location_deci: [Root.GetTeamDescription] [Root.GetTeamShip] [Root.GetTeamSupplies]\nDisaster! The team had just finished their first few days of work in a museum when a team of [STH_relic_hunters_mark_country.GetInternalSecurityName] agents stormed the building! Some of the team members had been flagged in a late background check, and therefore [STH_relic_hunters_mark_country.GetInternalSecurityName] dug further and was going to bring them in for questioning! Fortunatly, the team was able to shoot their way out, but now they are being hunted by [STH_relic_hunters_mark_country.GetInternalSecurityName] agents.

[Root.GetTeamDescription] [Root.GetTeamShip] [Root.GetTeamSupplies]\nDisaster! The team had just finished their first few days of work in a museum when a team of [STH_relic_hunters_mark_country.GetInternalSecurityName] agents stormed the building! Some of the team members had been flagged in a late background check, and therefore [STH_relic_hunters_mark_country.GetInternalSecurityName] dug further and was going to bring them in for questioning! The team was unable to shoot their way out, and were captured! The team lead told the interrogators about our involvement!
STH_relic_hunters.734.desc_infiltrators_: [Root.GetTeamDescription] [Root.GetTeamShip] [Root.GetTeamSupplies]\nThrough stealth or guile, the team has managed to locate a [STH_relic_hunters_mark_country.GetVaultName] holding the relics and wealth of the [STH_relic_hunters_mark_country.GetName]. They must now prepare for the day of the heist.
STH_relic_hunters.734.desc_mercenaries_l: [Root.GetTeamDescription] [Root.GetTeamShip] [Root.GetTeamSupplies]\nThrough strength or cunning, the team has managed to locate a [STH_relic_hunters_mark_country.GetVaultName] holding the relics and wealth of the [STH_relic_hunters_mark_country.GetName]. They must now prepare for the day of the heist.
STH_relic_hunters.734.title: Location Phase Successful!
STH_relic_hunters.735.desc_execution_dec:
[Root.GetTeamDescription] [Root.GetTeamShip] [Root.GetTeamSupplies]
The night before the heist, the team must decide what kind of tactics to use:

The team has gained the support of the local Ferengi branch office, and therefore will be conducting a targeted negotiation, bribing key officials and removing problematic individuals to effectively purchase an extended lease on the relics inside the [STH_relic_hunters_mark_country.GetVaultName].

[Root.GetTeamDescription] [Root.GetTeamShip] [Root.GetTeamSupplies]
The night before the heist, the team must decide what kind of tactics to use:

The team has gained the support of the local Syndicate branch office, and therefore will be conducting a night raid, neutralizing key guards and utilizing stolen credentials and codes to access the [STH_relic_hunters_mark_country.GetVaultName].

[Root.GetTeamDescription] [Root.GetTeamShip] [Root.GetTeamSupplies]
The night before the heist, the team must decide what kind of tactics to use:

The team has gained the support of the local Yridian branch office, and therefore will be conducting a night raid, blackmailing key guards and utilizing stolen credentials and codes to access the [STH_relic_hunters_mark_country.GetVaultName].
STH_relic_hunters.736.desc_execution_dec:
[Root.GetTeamDescription] [Root.GetTeamShip] [Root.GetTeamSupplies]
The night before the heist, the team must decide what kind of tactics to use:

The team lead has decided that the best course of action is to make a direct assault on the [STH_relic_hunters_mark_country.GetVaultName] and plant explosives on the vault doors.
STH_relic_hunters.737.desc_execution_dec:
[Root.GetTeamDescription] [Root.GetTeamShip] [Root.GetTeamSupplies]
The night before the heist, the team must decide what kind of tactics to use:

The team lead has decided that the best course of action is to utilize the contacts gained through their recent security work. They would replace or neutralize key guards of the [STH_relic_hunters_mark_country.GetVaultName] and plant explosives on the vault doors.
STH_relic_hunters.738.desc_execution_dec:
[Root.GetTeamDescription] [Root.GetTeamShip] [Root.GetTeamSupplies]
The night before the heist, the team must decide what kind of tactics to use:

The team lead has decided that the best course of action is to make a night assault on the [STH_relic_hunters_mark_country.GetVaultName]: distract the guards, disrupt communications, and hack the vault doors.
STH_relic_hunters.739.desc_execution_dec:
[Root.GetTeamDescription] [Root.GetTeamShip] [Root.GetTeamSupplies]
The night before the heist, the team must decide what kind of tactics to use:

The team lead has decided that the best course of action is to utilize the contacts gained through their recent cultural work. They would impersonate an important member of the government archive and use their credentials to open the vault doors.
STH_relic_hunters.740.desc_execution_dec: [Root.GetTeamDescription] [Root.GetTeamShip] [Root.GetTeamSupplies]\nThe perimeter guards were gracious escorts to the negotiation team, along with the host official, who made sure that they were welcome on the tour of the facility. As the vault doors opened, everyone gasped in awe as a treasure trove of cultural artifacts was revealed. Then copious amount of latinum were exchanged, secret account numbers revealed and many artifacts and precious materials were moved to the ship for further study. The team quickly regrouped at their ship and prepared to take off.

[Root.GetTeamDescription] [Root.GetTeamShip] [Root.GetTeamSupplies]\nThe perimeter guards were taken down silently and swiftly, and the inner defences were neutralized minutes later. The vault doors opened after using stolen credentials, revealing a treasure trove of cultural artifacts, along with some precious materials and interesting documents. The team gathered what they could, then quickly returned to their ship and prepared to take off.

[Root.GetTeamDescription] [Root.GetTeamShip] [Root.GetTeamSupplies]\nThe perimeter guards were mysteriously absent, and the inner defences appeared to be malfunctioning minutes later. The vault doors opened after using stolen credentials, revealing a treasure trove of cultural artifacts, along with some precious materials and interesting documents. A careful search revealed a hidden door, leading to a secondary vault further in! The team gathered everything they could get their hands on, then quickly returned to their ship and prepared to take off.
STH_relic_hunters.741.desc_execution_dec: [Root.GetTeamDescription] [Root.GetTeamShip] [Root.GetTeamSupplies]\nThe perimeter guards were gracious escorts to the negotiation team, along with the host official, who made sure that they were welcome on the tour of the facility. As the vault doors openend, everyone gasped in awe as a treasure trove of cultural artifacts was revealed. However, from behind display cases and exhibits arose [STH_relic_hunters_mark_country.GetInternalSecurityName] agents! The corrupt official was not so corrupt after all! The team was captured by the quick response forces, and told interrogators of our involvement!

[Root.GetTeamDescription] [Root.GetTeamShip] [Root.GetTeamSupplies]\nThe perimeter guards were taken down silently and swiftly, and the inner defences were neutralized minutes later. However, the vault doors were made of a material that did not give even under sustained weapons fire, and any hacking attempts were to no avail. The team was captured by the quick response forces, and told interrogators of our involvement!

[Root.GetTeamDescription] [Root.GetTeamShip] [Root.GetTeamSupplies]\nThe perimeter guards were mysteriously absent, and the inner defences appeared to be malfunctioning minutes later. However, the vault doors were made of a material that did not give even under sustained weapons fire, and any hacking attempts were to no avail. The team was captured by the quick response forces, and told interrogators of our involvement!
STH_relic_hunters.742.desc_execution_dec: [Root.GetTeamDescription] [Root.GetTeamShip] [Root.GetTeamSupplies]\nThe perimeter guards were not expecting the swift and sudden assault on the front entrance, and the inner defences were neutralized minutes later. The vault doors were blown open with a hefty amount of explosives, revealing a treasure trove of cultural artifacts, along with some precious materials and interesting documents. The team gathered what they could, then quickly returned to their ship and prepared to take off.
STH_relic_hunters.743.desc_execution_dec: [Root.GetTeamDescription] [Root.GetTeamShip] [Root.GetTeamSupplies]\nDisaster! The perimeter guards were not expecting the swift and sudden assault on the front entrance, and the inner defences were neutralized minutes later. However, the vault doors were made of a material that did not give even under sustained weapons fire, and any hacking attempts were to no avail. The team was captured by the quick response forces, and told interrogators of our involvement.

The team was captured by the quick response forces, told interrogators of our involvement, then were subsequently executed!

The vault doors were blown open with a hefty amount of explosives, revealing a treasure trove of cultural artifacts, along with some precious materials and interesting documents. The team gathered what they could, then quickly returned to their ship and prepared to take off.

The team was captured by the quick response forces, and told interrogators of our involvement.
STH_relic_hunters.746.desc_execution_dec: [Root.GetTeamDescription] [Root.GetTeamShip] [Root.GetTeamSupplies]\nThe perimeter guards were called to respond to an incident nearby, and the inner defences were neutralized minutes later. The vault doors opened after some intense hacking, revealing a treasure trove of cultural artifacts, along with some precious materials and interesting documents. The team gathered what they could, then quickly returned to their ship and prepared to take off.
STH_relic_hunters.747.desc_execution_dec: [Root.GetTeamDescription] [Root.GetTeamShip] [Root.GetTeamSupplies]\nDisaster! The perimeter guards were called to respond to an incident nearby, and the inner defences were neutralized minutes later. However, the vault doors failed to open even after intense hacking attempts, and were made of a material that did not give even under sustained weapons fire. The team was captured by the quick response forces, and told interrogators of our involvement.

[Root.GetTeamDescription] [Root.GetTeamShip] [Root.GetTeamSupplies]\nDisaster! The perimeter guards were called to respond to an incident nearby, and the inner defences were neutralized minutes later. However, the vault doors failed to open even after intense hacking attempts, and were made of a material that did not give even under sustained weapons fire. The team was captured by the quick response forces, told interrogators of our involvement, then were subsequently executed.
STH_relic_hunters.748.desc_execution_dec: [Root.GetTeamDescription] [Root.GetTeamShip] [Root.GetTeamSupplies]\nThe perimeter guards accepted the team member's credentials, and the inner defences did not fire on them. The vault doors opened after entering their credentials, revealing a treasure trove of cultural artifacts, along with some precious materials and interesting documents. The team member obtained the most important looking relic, then attempted to walk out. Any questions asked were quickly deflected or justified using false transfer papers. They quickly returned to the ship and the team prepared to take off.
STH_relic_hunters.749.desc_execution_dec: [Root.GetTeamDescription] [Root.GetTeamShip] [Root.GetTeamSupplies]\nDisaster! The perimeter guards accepted the team member's credentials, and the inner defences did not fire on them. However, the team member did not expect the person they were impersonating arrive just before them to inspect the vault! The team member was captured by the quick response forces, and told interrogators of our involvement. The rest of the team attempted to flee on the ship, but were also caught by responding patrol ships.
STH_relic_hunters.750.desc_infiltrators_: [Root.GetTeamDescription] [Root.GetTeamShip] [Root.GetTeamSupplies]\nThrough stealth or guile, the team has managed to loot a [STH_relic_hunters_mark_country.GetVaultName] holding the relics and wealth of the [STH_relic_hunters_mark_country.GetName]! They were able to escape the planet without being detected, and are now on their way back to the [STH_relic_hunters_hiring_country.GetName]. The team eagerly sifts through the loot they have gathered...
STH_relic_hunters.750.desc_mercenaries_e: [Root.GetTeamDescription] [Root.GetTeamShip] [Root.GetTeamSupplies]\nThrough strength or cunning, the team has managed to loot a [STH_relic_hunters_mark_country.GetVaultName] holding the relics and wealth of the [STH_relic_hunters_mark_country.GetName]! They were able to escape the planet in the ensuing mayhem, and are now on their way back to the [STH_relic_hunters_hiring_country.GetName]. The team eagerly sifts through the loot they have gathered...
STH_relic_hunters.750.title: Execution Phase Successful!
STH_relic_hunters.751.desc_withdrawl_dec: [Root.GetTeamDescription] [Root.GetTeamShip] [Root.GetTeamSupplies]\nWhile sifting through the loot, one of the relics appears to be damaged during the return to the ship. Upon closer examination, it is revealed to be a fake artifact! Frantic examination of the rest of the loot turns up only a few real relics in the entire haul! Even worse, some time after the ship leaves orbit of [STH_relic_hunters_mark_country.Capital.GetName], some enemy ships appear in pursuit!
STH_relic_hunters.751.trackers: Hopefully they can escape their pursuers...
STH_relic_hunters.752.desc_withdrawl_dec: [Root.GetTeamDescription] [Root.GetTeamShip] [Root.GetTeamSupplies]\nWhile sifting through the loot, one of the relics appears to be damaged during the return to the ship. Upon closer examination, it is revealed to be a fake artifact! Frantic examination of the rest of the loot turns up only a few real relics in the entire haul! Fortunately, the ship was able to evade any patrols after leaving orbit of [STH_relic_hunters_mark_country.Capital.GetName], and are now on their way back to the [STH_relic_hunters_hiring_country.GetName].
STH_relic_hunters.753.desc_withdrawl_dec: [Root.GetTeamDescription] [Root.GetTeamShip] [Root.GetTeamSupplies]\nWhile sifting through the loot, one of the relics appears to be damaged during the return to the ship. Upon closer examination, it is revealed to have a tracker attached to it! Frantic examination of the rest of the loot turns up several other relics with trackers! While the techincal team members work on disabling the trackers without damaging the artifacts, some enemy ships appear in pursuit!
STH_relic_hunters.753.title: They are tracking us!
STH_relic_hunters.753.trackers: Hopefully they can escape their pursuers...
STH_relic_hunters.754.desc_withdrawl_dec: [Root.GetTeamDescription] [Root.GetTeamShip] [Root.GetTeamSupplies]\nAll of the artifacts grabbed by the the team appear genuine. The team was able to evade any patrols after leaving orbit of [STH_relic_hunters_mark_country.Capital.GetName], and are now on their way back to the [STH_relic_hunters_hiring_country.GetName].
STH_relic_hunters.755.desc_withdrawl_dec: [Root.GetTeamDescription] [Root.GetTeamShip] [Root.GetTeamSupplies]\nAfter evading or destroying the pursuit ships, and tossing all of the fake relics into space (of which at least one had a tracking device), the team breathes a sigh of relief after slipping through the border.
STH_relic_hunters.756.desc_withdrawl_dec: [Root.GetTeamDescription] [Root.GetTeamShip] [Root.GetTeamSupplies]\nDisaster! The team had just barely evaded the first wave of pursuit vessels when a naval fleet on training excercises spotted them. Their ship was no match for them, so they attempted to flee, to no avail. The ship was disabled, then boarded, and the captain told the navy officers who sent them after interrogation! They were arrested and the ship impounded.

[Root.GetTeamDescription] [Root.GetTeamShip] [Root.GetTeamSupplies]\nDisaster! The team had just barely evaded the first wave of pursuit vessels when a naval fleet on training excercises spotted them. Their ship was no match for them, so they attempted to flee, to no avail. The ship was disabled, then boarded, and the captain told the navy officers who sent them after interrogation! The [STH_relic_hunters_mark_country.GetName] is not tolerant of tresspassers, and the entire crew were executed or enslaved.
STH_relic_hunters.757.desc_withdrawl_dec: [Root.GetTeamDescription] [Root.GetTeamShip] [Root.GetTeamSupplies]\nAfter evading or destroying the pursuit ships, and disabling all known trackers, the team breathes a sigh of relief after slipping through the border.
STH_relic_hunters.758.desc_withdrawl_dec: [Root.GetTeamDescription] [Root.GetTeamShip] [Root.GetTeamSupplies]\nDisaster! The team had just barely evaded the first wave of pursuit vessels when a naval fleet on training excercises spotted them. Their ship was no match for them, so they attempted to flee, to no avail. The ship was disabled, then boarded, and the captain told the navy officers who sent them after interrogation! They were arrested, the ship was impounded, and the stolen artifacts were returned.

[Root.GetTeamDescription] [Root.GetTeamShip] [Root.GetTeamSupplies]\nDisaster! The team had just barely evaded the first wave of pursuit vessels when a naval fleet on training excercises spotted them. Their ship was no match for them, so they attempted to flee, to no avail. The ship was disabled, then boarded, and the captain told the navy officers who sent them after interrogation! The [STH_relic_hunters_mark_country.GetName] is not tolerant of tresspassers, and the entire crew were executed or enslaved.
STH_relic_hunters.759.desc_team_rewards_: After returning to [STH_relic_hunters_hiring_country.GetName], the team was given their pay, and the haul placed in the appropriate vaults. The fact that the team was duped by fake artifacts means that they will not be hired again.

After returning to [STH_relic_hunters_hiring_country.GetName], the team was given their pay, and the haul placed in the appropriate vaults. The team went their seperate ways to enjoy their portion of the loot. The relics that were recovered are put away in a secret vault.
STH_relic_hunters.759.title: A Successful Heist!
STH_relic_hunters.8001.desc: We have obtained the cultural relics of the [LastKilledCountryName] to be placed in out vaults!
STH_relic_hunters.8001.title: We have gained their cultural relics
STH_relic_hunters.relic_auction.desc_has: The auction has concluded! The [STH_relic_hunters_winning_bidder_country_cultural_owner.GetName] is now the proud owner of the [STH_relic_hunters_selling_country.GetAuctionedRelicName]. The [STH_relic_hunters_winning_bidder_country_cultural_owner.GetSpeciesNamePlural] people are grateful for the return of their heritage! This auction has improved the influence of the [STH_relic_hunters_broker_country.GetName] in the financial world, as well as making them a tidy profit.

The auction has concluded! The [STH_relic_hunters_winning_bidder_country.GetName] is now the proud owner of the [STH_relic_hunters_selling_country.GetAuctionedRelicName]. This auction has improved the influence of the [STH_relic_hunters_broker_country.GetName] in the financial world, as well as making them a tidy profit.
